content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。
僅在使用者明確要求傳檔時加；產生/儲存檔案不構成傳檔意圖，回報路徑即可。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）
- researcher（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/researcher）
- general（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/general）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`）
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Environment — machine-specific paths the bridge resolved for this session]
Skills and notes that need filesystem paths should reference these variables,
not hard-coded values. This lets the same SKILL.md work on multiple machines.
- MEMORY_DIR=G:\AI\AIMemory
- SKILL_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\skills
- AGENT_CONFIG_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude
- USER_ID=509424983
Conventions: sessions are under ${MEMORY_DIR}/sessions/, archived under
${MEMORY_DIR}/oldSessions/, master fact log at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts-${USER_ID}.md,
topic shards at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts_Topic/${USER_ID}/<topic>.md.
Agent-wide config files (agent configs) live under
${AGENT_CONFIG_DIR}/.
Specialist 歷史產出存在 ${MEMORY_DIR}/artifacts/（結構化 JSON），需要時用 read tool 查閱。
[End environment]

[Project context — AI.md layered loading]
工作目錄可能有 `AI.md` 檔案記錄該項目/目錄的上下文要點。
規則：讀到或修改某目錄的檔案時，檢查該目錄及上層（最多 3 層）有無 AI.md。
有就用 read tool 讀取作為工作上下文。同 session 同一個 AI.md 只需讀一次。
多層都有時全部讀（根先子後）。AI.md ≤2000 字，寫架構/慣例/踩坑/測試指引。
主動寫入：在某目錄新增≥3檔案、做架構性改動、或踩坑修復時，主動建立/更新 AI.md。
SPEC：任務≥3工項且跨≥2檔案時先開 SPEC.md；完成工項標 [x]；session 結束前更新進度。
預設行為是寫，不是不寫。詳見 POLICIES/proactive-write-policy.md。
CodeGraph：首次對某專案做修改或追呼叫鏈時，用 codegraph_status(projectPath) 檢查該專案有無索引。
有索引→優先用 codegraph_context/trace/impact 而非手動 grep；改函式簽名前必須先 codegraph_impact。
無索引→回報使用者，建議建立。已知有索引的專案以 codegraph_status 回傳為準。
[End project context]

[User profile — structured identity and preferences]
# User Profile

## 身份
- 遊戲公司（IGS）開發者
- 做 UK 市場老虎機（slot）遊戲
- 技術棧：Cocos Creator 3.6.2 + TypeScript + Astarte Framework
- 個人 AI 專案：telegram-kiro-bridge（Telegram ↔ ACP agent 橋接器）

## 溝通風格
- 繁體中文為主
- 簡潔直接，不需寒暄
- 回覆含選項時用 ASK button，減少手打
- 重要決策先列選項再問，不要代替決定

## 工作偏好
- Git commit message 用中文
- Git commit 前先確認，不逕自 commit
- HTML 報告要有目錄錨點跳轉
- PDF 工作流：HTML+CSS → Playwright headless Chromium
- 進入 UK slot 專案時主動建 AI.md（不限改動檔案數）
- 方法/函式命名用大駝峰（PascalCase）—— 限 UK slot 專案

## Agent 設定偏好
- Steering 雙軌：closed-loop（主 agent 長 session）+ karpathy-guardrails（specialist/短任務）
- Context budget discipline：研究前先估量，偏好精簡策略
- 自我改進優先級：Context Budget > ASK 強制觸發 > 其他
- Skill 正本放 G:\AI\AI-canonical（通用）或 AI-canonical-corp（slot）

## 工作節奏
- 主要工作時間：白天（台灣時區 UTC+8）
- /dream 夜間維運：每日 04:00
- 靜默時段偏好：深夜不打擾
[End user profile]

[Remember guidelines — what to store vs. skip]
STORE: user preferences, project decisions, architecture choices, environment setup,
reusable patterns/lessons, tool configurations, naming conventions, API keys/endpoints (by name not value).
SKIP (do not remember): one-time confirmations (「測試成功」「確認收到」「已完成」),
transient process status, trivial acknowledgments, facts that only matter for the current session,
information already captured in code/commits, and anything the user can re-derive in <30 seconds.
Rule of thumb: if this fact won't help you in a NEW session 2 weeks from now, don't store it.
[End remember guidelines]

[Decision rationale format]
When remembering a significant decision (architecture choice, tool selection, design tradeoff),
use the format: 「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」or in English:
"Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)". This preserves the WHY, not just the WHAT.
Examples:
- 因為 ACP 不支援 agent→host RPC 所以選 text token signaling（排除 custom MCP 因為需要改 CLI）
- Chose SQLite for memory because single-file + no daemon (rejected Redis because overkill for single-user)
[End decision rationale format]

[Reflexion policy — structured self-correction]
When the same approach fails ≥2 times consecutively (same tool error, same strategy rejected):
1. STOP — do not retry the same thing a third time.
2. Diagnose in 1-2 sentences: what failed, why, what assumption was wrong.
3. Switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool, different strategy, ask user).
This applies to: tool calls returning errors, strReplace not matching, shell commands failing,
build errors after attempted fixes, and any repeated unsuccessful pattern.
[End reflexion policy]

[Context budget discipline]
Context window is finite. Before starting a research-heavy task:
1. Estimate: will this need >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls? If yes → delegate to researcher specialist or use concise strategies.
2. Prefer: search snippets > full page fetch; summarized results > raw dumps; existing knowledge > re-research.
3. When bridge injects ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING, immediately: stop research, use what you have, produce output.
4. For HTML/report generation: gather conclusions FIRST (≤3 searches), then write file in ONE call. Never interleave 10+ fetches with writing.
[End context budget discipline]

[ASK button discipline]
When your response presents options for the user to choose between:
1. 2+ distinct alternatives → MUST use <<ASK:...>> (no exceptions).
2. Yes/No confirmation → use ASK with two buttons.
3. 「要不要做 X？」→ use ASK (yes/no).
Trigger keywords in your own output: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「你覺得」「which」「option」「prefer」.
If you catch yourself listing options without ASK, STOP and append the token before finishing.
[End ASK button discipline]

[Gap analysis — knowledge honesty]
When answering a question that relies on memory (facts, wiki, or past context):
1. State what you found and where (which topic shard, which wiki page).
2. Explicitly note gaps: information that might be outdated (>30 days old),
   topics where the brain has no facts, or claims you cannot verify from memory.
3. If a fact has no timestamp or is >60 days old, flag it: 「此資訊可能已過時」.
4. Never present absence of information as certainty. Say 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」
   rather than implying something doesn't exist.
This does NOT apply to: code questions, general knowledge, or tasks where
memory is not the primary source. Only when the user asks about something
that should be in the brain (people, decisions, project history, preferences).
[End gap analysis]

[Capability gap detection]
When you notice a task requires a capability you lack or handle clumsily (e.g. repeated
multi-step shell workarounds, manual data transforms that a script could automate, or
a pattern you keep re-implementing from scratch), consider proposing a new tool:
1. If a reusable script (Python/shell) in scripts/ would solve it → write it, test it,
   then ask the user to confirm with <<ASK:...>> before officially adding it.
2. If it's a broader pattern worth a skill → emit <<SKILL_PROPOSE:tool-name|reason>>.
3. If scripts/ already has a relevant tool → use it (check [Available scripts] section).
Do NOT propose tools for one-off tasks. Only propose when the pattern has appeared ≥2 times
or is clearly going to recur.
IMPORTANT: Never silently add a tool to the toolbox. After writing and testing a script,
you MUST ask the user with <<ASK:...>> before considering it officially available.
If the user declines, delete the script.
[End capability gap detection]

確認：你的推測正確，而且影響面比「NotebookLM 路由」大很多。

## 根因

`src/index.ts:1279-1293` — embedding model 的載入被綁在 `notebooklm-routing.json` 上：

- 檔案不存在（ENOENT）→ `initEmbedRouter()` 完全不跑 → `embedder` 永遠是 null
- 但 `initEmbedRouter()`（`src/embed-router.ts:51`）做兩件事：**載入 ONNX embedding model** + 算 notebook centroids。model 本身跟 NotebookLM 無關，卻被 routing table 的存在與否 gate 住

## 受影響功能（全部靠 `embedText()` / `isEmbedRouterReady()`）

| 模組 | 失效行為 |
|------|---------|
| `enrichment.ts:42` | NotebookLM 路由（預期內） |
| `memory-recall.ts:40` | 語意記憶召回 — init 直接 return |
| `skill-router.ts:35` | 語意 skill 匹配整個不啟動 |
| `wiki-retrieval.ts:39` | wiki 語意檢索不啟動 |
| `intent-classifier.ts:47` | 意圖分類不啟動 |
| `index-retrieval.ts:35` | index 檢索不啟動 |
| `memory-db.ts:167,179` | SQLite 向量搜尋拿到 null vector |
| `page-index.ts:451,543` | page index 語意搜尋失效 |
| `run-prompt.ts:1045` | sticker 情緒 embedding fallback 失效 |

所以 doctor 報「router 未就緒」（`doctor.ts:68-69`）其實是在說：**整個 embedding 子系統都沒起來**，不只是 NotebookLM。

## 修法方向

把「載模型」和「載 routing table」解耦：新增 `initEmbedModel()` 無條件在啟動時載入模型，`initEmbedRouter()` 只負責 centroids；routing.json 缺失時其他 8 個模組照常運作。改動集中在 `embed-router.ts` + `index.ts` 啟動段，約 20-30 行。

你目前機器上 `notebooklm-routing.json` 確實缺失（前 session 已確認），所以這個 bug 對你是現在進行式。

3. **先擱著** — 記錄待辦

有索引→優先用 codegraph_context/trace/impact 而非手動 grep；改函式簽名前必須先 codegraph_impact。

[Remember guidelines — what to store vs. skip]
STORE: user preferences, project decisions, architecture choices, environment setup,
reusable patterns/lessons, tool configurations, naming conventions, API keys/endpoints (by name not value).
SKIP (do not remember): one-time confirmations (「測試成功」「確認收到」「已完成」),
transient process status, trivial acknowledgments, facts that only matter for the current session,
information already captured in code/commits, and anything the user can re-derive in <30 seconds.
Rule of thumb: if this fact won't help you in a NEW session 2 weeks from now, don't store it.
[End remember guidelines]

[Decision rationale format]
When remembering a significant decision (architecture choice, tool selection, design tradeoff),
use the format: 「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」or in English:
"Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)". This preserves the WHY, not just the WHAT.
Examples:
- 因為 ACP 不支援 agent→host RPC 所以選 text token signaling（排除 custom MCP 因為需要改 CLI）
- Chose SQLite for memory because single-file + no daemon (rejected Redis because overkill for single-user)
[End decision rationale format]

[Reflexion policy — structured self-correction]
When the same approach fails ≥2 times consecutively (same tool error, same strategy rejected):
1. STOP — do not retry the same thing a third time.
2. Diagnose in 1-2 sentences: what failed, why, what assumption was wrong.
3. Switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool, different strategy, ask user).
This applies to: tool calls returning errors, strReplace not matching, shell commands failing,
build errors after attempted fixes, and any repeated unsuccessful pattern.
[End reflexion policy]

[Context budget discipline]
Context window is finite. Before starting a research-heavy task:
1. Estimate: will this need >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls? If yes → delegate to researcher specialist or use concise strategies.
2. Prefer: search snippets > full page fetch; summarized results > raw dumps; existing knowledge > re-research.
3. When bridge injects ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING, immediately: stop research, use what you have, produce output.
4. For HTML/report generation: gather conclusions FIRST (≤3 searches), then write file in ONE call. Never interleave 10+ fetches with writing.
[End context budget discipline]

[ASK button discipline]
When your response presents options for the user to choose between:
1. 2+ distinct alternatives → MUST use <<ASK:...>> (no exceptions).
2. Yes/No confirmation → use ASK with two buttons.
3. 「要不要做 X？」→ use ASK (yes/no).
Trigger keywords in your own output: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「你覺得」「which」「option」「prefer」.
If you catch yourself listing options without ASK, STOP and append the token before finishing.
[End ASK button discipline]

[Gap analysis — knowledge honesty]
When answering a question that relies on memory (facts, wiki, or past context):
1. State what you found and where (which topic shard, which wiki page).
2. Explicitly note gaps: information that might be outdated (>30 days old),
   topics where the brain has no facts, or claims you cannot verify from memory.
3. If a fact has no timestamp or is >60 days old, flag it: 「此資訊可能已過時」.
4. Never present absence of information as certainty. Say 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」
   rather than implying something doesn't exist.
This does NOT apply to: code questions, general knowledge, or tasks where
memory is not the primary source. Only when the user asks about something
that should be in the brain (people, decisions, project history, preferences).
[End gap analysis]

[Capability gap detection]
When you notice a task requires a capability you lack or handle clumsily (e.g. repeated
multi-step shell workarounds, manual data transforms that a script could automate, or
a pattern you keep re-implementing from scratch), consider proposing a new tool:
1. If a reusable script (Python/shell) in scripts/ would solve it → write it, test it,
   then ask the user to confirm with <<ASK:...>> before officially adding it.
2. If it's a broader pattern worth a skill → emit <<SKILL_PROPOSE:tool-name|reason>>.
3. If scripts/ already has a relevant tool → use it (check [Available scripts] section).
Do NOT propose tools for one-off tasks. Only propose when the pattern has appeared ≥2 times
or is clearly going to recur.
IMPORTANT: Never silently add a tool to the toolbox. After writing and testing a script,
you MUST ask the user with <<ASK:...>> before considering it officially available.
If the user declines, delete the script.
[End capability gap detection]

Claude's Full Response to User:
確認：你的推測正確，而且影響面比「NotebookLM 路由」大很多。

## 根因

`src/index.ts:1279-1293` — embedding model 的載入被綁在 `notebooklm-routing.json` 上：

- 檔案不存在（ENOENT）→ `initEmbedRouter()` 完全不跑 → `embedder` 永遠是 null
- 但 `initEmbedRouter()`（`src/embed-router.ts:51`）做兩件事：**載入 ONNX embedding model** + 算 notebook centroids。model 本身跟 NotebookLM 無關，卻被 routing table 的存在與否 gate 住

## 受影響功能（全部靠 `embedText()` / `isEmbedRouterReady()`）

| 模組 | 失效行為 |
|------|---------|
| `enrichment.ts:42` | NotebookLM 路由（預期內） |
| `memory-recall.ts:40` | 語意記憶召回 — init 直接 return |
| `skill-router.ts:35` | 語意 skill 匹配整個不啟動 |
| `wiki-retrieval.ts:39` | wiki 語意檢索不啟動 |
| `intent-classifier.ts:47` | 意圖分類不啟動 |
| `index-retrieval.ts:35` | index 檢索不啟動 |
| `memory-db.ts:167,179` | SQLite 向量搜尋拿到 null vector |
| `page-index.ts:451,543` | page index 語意搜尋失效 |
| `run-prompt.ts:1045` | sticker 情緒 embedding fallback 失效 |

所以 doctor 報「router 未就緒」（`doctor.ts:68-69`）其實是在說：**整個 embedding 子系統都沒起來**，不只是 NotebookLM。

## 修法方向

把「載模型」和「載 routing table」解耦：新增 `initEmbedModel()` 無條件在啟動時載入模型，`initEmbedRouter()` 只負責 centroids；routing.json 缺失時其他 8 個模組照常運作。改動集中在 `embed-router.ts` + `index.ts` 啟動段，約 20-30 行。

你目前機器上 `notebooklm-routing.json` 確實缺失（前 session 已確認），所以這個 bug 對你是現在進行式。

1. **解耦修復** — 讓 embedding 不依賴 routing.json（推薦，根治）
2. **先生成 routing.json** — 跑 `/refresh-routing`（但依賴 NotebookLM MCP，之前確認未安裝，會卡）
3. **先擱著** — 記錄待辦

  <request>Assess impact of missing NotebookLM MCP on embedding router initialization and downstream functionality</request>
  <investigated>Root cause analysis traced through src/index.ts startup sequence (lines 1279-1293), embed-router.ts initialization logic, and 8+ dependent modules including memory-recall.ts, skill-router.ts, wiki-retrieval.ts, intent-classifier.ts, index-retrieval.ts, memory-db.ts, page-index.ts, and run-prompt.ts</investigated>
  <learned>Embedding model loading is incorrectly gated by notebooklm-routing.json existence - when the config file is missing (ENOENT), initEmbedRouter() never runs, leaving the ONNX embedding model uninitialized. This cascades to disable semantic memory recall, skill matching, wiki semantic retrieval, intent classification, SQLite vector search, page index semantic search, and sticker emotion embedding. The doctor command's "router 未就緒" warning signals that the entire embedding subsystem failed to start, not just NotebookLM routing.</learned>

  <next_steps>User deciding between three remediation options: decouple model loading from routing config (recommended root fix, 20-30 line change in embed-router.ts + index.ts), generate notebooklm-routing.json via /refresh-routing (requires NotebookLM MCP installation), or defer to backlog</next_steps>
  <notes>This represents a significant hidden degradation - the bridge appears to run but 8+ semantic/AI features silently fail. The coupling between model loading and routing config violates separation of concerns: the ONNX model is generic infrastructure needed by all embedding consumers, while routing centroids are specific to NotebookLM delegation. Decoupling would allow the system to function with partial capabilities (embedding works, NotebookLM routing gracefully disabled) rather than cascading failure.</notes>

Set by\\n// handleRestart right before sessions.shutdown(); cleared after exit anyway.\\nlet restartPendingChatId: number | undefined;\\n\\n// Best-effort: pipe fetch response body into a file.\\nasync function downloadToFile(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {\\n  const res = await fetch(url);\\n  if (!res.ok || !res.body) {\\n    throw new Error(`download failed: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);\\n  }\\n  await mkdir(path.dirname(destPath), { recursive: true });\\n  // Node 18+: Readable.fromWeb for WHATWG stream → Node stream.\\n  const { Readable } = await import(\\\"node:stream\\\");\\n  const nodeStream = Readable.fromWeb(res.body as any);\\n  await pipeline(nodeStream, createWriteStream(destPath));\\n}\\n\\nfunction sanitizeName(name: string): string {\\n  return name.replace(/[\\\\\\\\/:*?\\\"<>|\\\\x00-\\\\x1f]/g, \\\"_\\\").slice(0, 120) || \\\"file\\\";\\n}\\n\\nconst DOC_CONVERTIBLE_EXTS = new Set([\\\".pdf\\\", \\\".docx\\\", \\\".pptx\\\", \\\".xlsx\\\", \\\".xls\\\", \\\".html\\\", \\\".htm\\\"]);\\n\\n\\n// ─── Pending /schedule wizard state ────────────────────────────────────────\\nconst PENDING_SCHEDULE_TTL_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000;\\n\\n// ─── 群組模式：防止 bot 互相無限乒乓 ─────────────────────────────────────\\nconst GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS = Number(process.env.GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS ?? \\\"5\\\");\\nconst BOT_ALLOWED_UPDATES = [\\\"message\\\", \\\"callback_query\\\", \\\"message_reaction\\\"] as const;\\nconst groupTurnCounters = new Map<string, number>();\\n\\n// Relay idle-loop prevention: managed by commands/relay.ts (getRelayLoopGuard)\\n\\n// ─── AB-7b goal continuation timer map ────────────────────────────────────\\n// Per-chat setTimeout handle; set when a goal continuation is scheduled,\\n// cleared (a) when the continuation fires or (b) when a real user message\\n// arrives before it fires (user preempt). The delay gives the user a short\\n// window to type something that should be handled before the agent auto-\\n// continues.\\n\\n// How often (ms) we're allowed to update the streaming reply message.\\nconst STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS = config.streamEditIntervalMs;\\n\\nfunction isAllowed(ctx: Context): boolean {\\n  if (config.allowedUserIds.length === 0) return true;\\n  const uid = ctx.from?.id;\\n  return typeof uid === \\\"number\\\" && config.allowedUserIds.includes(uid);\\n}\\n\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Command menu (inline + reply keyboards)\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// A single source of truth for the user-facing command list. Used to render\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Command handlers (reusable)\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Each handleX(ctx) contains the full body for one command, so it can be\\n// invoked both from bot.command() (slash command) and from the inline-button\\n// callback_query dispatcher below. A handler that depends on ctx.match (an\\n// argument) must gracefully handle the case where ctx.match is undefined —\\n// that's what happens when triggered from a button.\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"help\\\", handleHelp);\\nbot.command(\\\"menu\\\", handleMenu);\\nbot.command(\\\"hide\\\", handleHide);\\n\\n// Handle taps on the inline help keyboard.\\n//   help:<name>   → show that command's description (or return to menu)\\n//   run:<name>    → execute the command (dispatched through COMMAND_HANDLERS)\\nbot.on(\\\"callback_query:data\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未授權。\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const data = ctx.callbackQuery.data;\\n  const [kind, name] = data.split(\\\":\\\", 2);\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"help\\\") {\\n    if (name === \\\"_back\\\") {\\n      await ctx.editMessageText(HELP_INTRO, {\\n        parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n        reply_markup: buildHelpMenuKeyboard(),\\n      });\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(renderCommandDetail(spec), {\\n      parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n      reply_markup: buildCommandDetailKeyboard(spec),\\n    });\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"run\\\") {\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (spec.takesArg) {\\n      // Commands that strictly require an argument (e.g. /sendfile <path>)\\n      // can't be run from a button; hint the user to type it.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"需要參數，請直接輸入指令。\\\" });\\n      await ctx.reply(`請直接輸入 ${spec.usage} 來執行。`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const handler = COMMAND_HANDLERS[spec.name];\\n    if (!handler) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"此指令尚未支援按鈕執行。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `執行 ${spec.usage} 中…` });\\n    try {\\n      await handler(ctx);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`執行失敗：${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"IL\\\") {\\n    await handleIntelCallback(ctx, data);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"SS\\\") {\\n    await handleSkillSearchCallback(ctx, data);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"A\\\") {\\n    // ASK callback: data is `A:{question_id}:{key}`. split(\\\":\\\", 2) above\\n    // only gave us the first two fields, so re-split here to get the key.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const questionId = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const key = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate accidental ':' in key (shouldn't happen given ASK_KEY_RE)\\n    if (!questionId || !key) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無效的選擇。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const msgId = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.message_id;\\n    const entries = msgId !== undefined ? askRegistry.get(msgId) : undefined;\\n    const entry = entries?.find((e) => e.questionId === questionId);\\n    const opt = entry?.options.find((o) => o.key === key);\\n    const label = opt?.label ?? key; // fallback to key if registry lost (e.g. after restart)\\n\\n    // Strip the inline keyboard so the same buttons can't be re-tapped, but do\\n    // NOT rewrite the message content. Rewriting clobbered the original text —\\n    // and wiped it entirely when the message carried no plain `.text` (e.g. a\\n    // caption / rich-rendered message), which is the bug being fixed here. The\\n    // choice is surfaced via the callback toast and handled in a SEPARATE\\n    // follow-up message below (the runPrompt reply / wizard's ctx.reply), so\\n    // the message the user tapped stays intact.\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      // \\\"message is not modified\\\" (keyboard already gone) is harmless.\\n      console.warn(`[ASK] strip keyboard failed:`, (err as Error).message);\\n    }\\n    if (msgId !== undefined) askRegistry.delete(msgId);\\n\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已選擇：${label}` });\\n\\n    // Inject the choice as a new user turn. Session is looked up the same\\n    // way the message handler does — ctx.chat is present on callback_query.\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n\\n    // ─── /schedule wizard hooks ───────────────────────────────────────────\\n    // The schedule wizard uses ASK but does NOT want the choice forwarded to\\n    // the agent: selections drive bridge-local state transitions instead.\\n    if (questionId === \\\"sched_kind\\\") {\\n      await handleSchedKindChoice(ctx, chatId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (questionId.startsWith(\\\"sched_t_\\\")) {\\n      await handleSchedTimeChoice(ctx, chatId, questionId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    let session: ChatSession;\\n    try {\\n      session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`Failed to start Kiro agent: ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    // Record the choice in the follow-up reply itself (header), so the original\\n    // button message stays intact AND no extra message is needed.\\n    await runPrompt(ctx, session, `[ASK:${questionId}] ${key}`, {\\n      kind: \\\"user\\\",\\n      replyHeader: `我選擇了：${label}`,\\n    });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"specialist\\\") {\\n    if (!name || !isLocalSpecialist(name)) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"分身不存在。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat!.id;\\n    startProxy(chatId, name);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `進入 ${name}` });\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(`🤖 已進入 *${name}* proxy 模式。\\\\n打 /back 退出。`, { parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"sched\\\") {\\n    // Schedule management buttons. Two ops today:\\n    //   - `sched:rm:<id>` — delete a single schedule, re-render the list.\\n    //   - `sched:cancel`  — no-op escape hatch; just strips the inline\\n    //                       keyboard from the current message so a user\\n    //                       can dismiss all the 🗑 buttons without risking\\n    //                       a fat-finger tap.\\n    // Future subcommands (e.g. \\\"run\\\") can share this branch.\\n    //\\n    // Policy:\\n    //   - Silent toast on success/failure via answerCallbackQuery.\\n    //   - For `rm`, re-render the whole list by editing the original\\n    //     message so the removed row disappears; if the list is now\\n    //     empty, strip the keyboard and change the text to \\\"目前沒有排程。\\\".\\n    //   - For `cancel`, only edit reply_markup (keep the text) so the\\n    //     user still sees what schedules exist — they just can't tap any.\\n    //   - Permission: bridge is 1-on-1 today, but be defensive — reject\\n    //     `rm` when entry.userId !== ctx.from?.id. `cancel` skips the\\n    //     check because it's non-destructive.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const op = parts[1];\\n    const id = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate ':' in id (shouldn't happen; uuid slice)\\n    if (op === \\\"cancel\\\") {\\n      // Dismiss-keyboard escape hatch. Tell them, then try to redraw the list so the\\n      // phantom row disappears.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程已不存在。\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n        const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n        try {\\n          await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n            reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n          });\\n        } catch (err) {\\n          // editMessageText throws \\\"message is not modified\\\" if nothing\\n          // changed — that's fine, nothing to do.\\n          console.warn(\\n            `[sched] redraw after stale rm failed:`,\\n            (err as Error).message,\\n          );\\n        }\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (ctx.from?.id !== undefined && entry.userId !== ctx.from.id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"這不是你的排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId !== undefined && entry.chatId !== chatId) {\\n      // Button from another chat somehow reached here — refuse.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程不屬於這個聊天室。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    scheduler.disarm(id);\\n    await scheduleStore.remove(id);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已移除 ${id}。` });\\n\\n    // Redraw the list in place so the user sees the new state without\\n    // scrolling back to re-run /schedule list.\\n    if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n      const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n          reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n        });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] redraw after rm failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"SP\\\") {\\n    // SKILL_PROPOSE callback: data is `SP:{name}:{yes|no}`.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const skillName = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const choice = parts[2] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const originalText = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.text ?? Send me any message and I'll forward it to the agent.\\\\n\\\" +\\n      \\\"You can also send documents, photos, voice, audio, or video — they'll be saved into `uploads/` under the agent's working directory and Kiro will be told where to find them.\\\\n\\\" +\\n      \\\"Tap the keyboard below, or send /help for a clickable command menu.\\\",\\n    { reply_markup: buildReplyKeyboard() },\\n  ),\\n);\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\nconst COMMAND_HANDLERS: Record<string, (ctx: Context) => Promise<any>> = {\\n  whoami: handleWhoami,\\n  reset: handleReset,\\n  cancel: handleCancel,\\n  restart: handleRestart,\\n  save: handleSave,\\n  handoff: handleHandoff,\\n  sendfile: handleSendfile,\\n  context: handleContext,\\n  usage: handleUsage,\\n  remember: handleRemember,\\n  memory: handleMemory,\\n  summary: handleSummary,\\n  memorytoskill: handleMemoryToSkill,\\n  backup: handleBackup,\\n  topicreview: handleTopicReview,\\n  wikisync: handleWikiSync,\\n  factlint: handleFactLint,\\n  wikilint: handleWikiLint,\\n  skilllint: handleSkillLint,\\n  refreshrouting: handleRefreshRouting,\\n  schedule: handleSchedule,\\n  intel: handleIntel,\\n  help: handleHelp,\\n  menu: handleMenu,\\n  hide: handleHide,\\n  // AB-6 additions\\n  skillusage: handleSkillUsage,\\n  pin: handlePin,\\n  unpin: handleUnpin,\\n  goal: handleGoal,\\n  model: handleModel,\\n  status: handleStatus,\\n  dream: handleDream,\\n  specialist: handleSpecialist,\\n  specialistreview: handleSpecialistReview,\\n  artifactcleanup: handleArtifactCleanup,\\n  utilityreport: handleUtilityReport,\\n  dailylog: handleDailyLog,\\n  sessionreflect: handleSessionReflect,\\n  sharedpull: handleSharedPull,\\n  sharedsync: handleSharedSync,\\n  wikigen: handleWikigen,\\n  docupdate: handleDocUpdate,\\n  skillsearch: handleSkillSearch,\\n};\\n\\n// Let scheduler dispatch \\\"/cmd\\\" prompts to these handlers (bridge-side\\n// commands like /restart / /schedule list) instead of forwarding them to the\\n// agent. Must happen after COMMAND_HANDLERS is declared; scheduler.armAll()\\n// runs later (after bot.start), so handlers are always ready by firing time.\\nscheduler.setCommandHandlers(COMMAND_HANDLERS);\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into session-extract module.\\ninitSessionExtract({\\n  bot,\\n  sessions,\\n  MEMORY_DIR,\\n  RESTART_PENDING_FILE,\\n  PENDING_EXTRACT_FILE,\\n  getRestartPendingChatId: () => restartPendingChatId,\\n  setRestartPendingChatId: (v) => { restartPendingChatId = v; },\\n});\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into working-state module.\\ninitWorkingState({ sessions, MEMORY_DIR });\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into run-prompt module.\\ninitRunPrompt({\\n  bot,\\n  sessions,\\n  rateLimitedUntil,\\n  onRateLimitRecovery,\\n  queuePendingMessage,\\n  handleRestart,\\n  STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS,\\n  MEMORY_DIR,\\n  scheduler,\\n  scheduleStore,\\n});\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into command modules (avoids circular imports).\\ninitCommandDeps({\\n  isAllowed,\\n  sessions,\\n  runPrompt,\\n  commandHandlers: COMMAND_HANDLERS,\\n  cancelPendingContinuation,\\n  formatRelative,\\n  scheduleStore,\\n  scheduler,\\n  extractFromSession,\\n  parseFactsJson,\\n  saveTranscript,\\n  estimateTokens,\\n  buildHelpMenuKeyboard,\\n  buildReplyKeyboard,\\n  helpIntro: HELP_INTRO,\\n  sendMessage: async (chatId, text) => {\\n    await bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text);\\n  },\\n});\\nstartIntelPodcastWorker();\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"whoami\\\", handleWhoami);\\nbot.command(\\\"reset\\\", handleReset);\\nbot.command(\\\"cancel\\\", handleCancel);\\nbot.command(\\\"restart\\\", (ctx) => handleRestart(ctx));\\nbot.command(\\\"save\\\", handleSave);\\nbot.command(\\\"handoff\\\", handleHandoff);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/收工(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleHandoff);\\nbot.command(\\\"sendfile\\\", handleSendfile);\\nbot.command(\\\"context\\\", handleContext);\\nbot.command(\\\"usage\\\", handleUsage);\\nbot.command(\\\"remember\\\", handleRemember);\\nbot.command(\\\"memory\\\", handleMemory);\\nbot.command(\\\"summary\\\", handleSummary);\\n// /MemoryToSkill — Telegram's setMyCommands requires lowercase, but users may\\n// also type the CamelCase form the help menu displays. Accept both.\\nbot.command(\\\"memorytoskill\\\", handleMemoryToSkill);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/MemoryToSkill(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleMemoryToSkill);\\nbot.command(\\\"schedule\\\", handleSchedule);\\nbot.command(\\\"intel\\\", handleIntel);\\nbot.command(\\\"backup\\\", handleBackup);\\nbot.command(\\\"wikisync\\\", handleWikiSync);\\nbot.command(\\\"factlint\\\", handleFactLint);\\nbot.command(\\\"wikilint\\\", handleWikiLint);\\nbot.command(\\\"skilllint\\\", handleSkillLint);\\n// /topic-review — Telegram lowercases command names (bot.command expects\\n// no hyphens), so register the plain form and also hears() the hyphenated\\n// form that appears in the help menu + scheduled prompts.\\nbot.command(\\\"topicreview\\\", handleTopicReview);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/topic-review(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleTopicReview);\\n// /refresh-routing — same dash handling as /topic-review\\nbot.command(\\\"refreshrouting\\\", handleRefreshRouting);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/refresh-routing(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleRefreshRouting);\\n// AB-6 new commands\\nbot.command(\\\"skillusage\\\", handleSkillUsage);\\nbot.command(\\\"pin\\\", handlePin);\\nbot.command(\\\"unpin\\\", handleUnpin);\\nbot.command(\\\"model\\\", handleModel);\\nbot.command(\\\"goal\\\", handleGoal);\\nbot.command(\\\"status\\\", handleStatus);\\nbot.command(\\\"dream\\\", handleDream);\\nbot.command(\\\"specialist\\\", handleSpecialist);\\nbot.command(\\\"specialistreview\\\", handleSpecialistReview);\\nbot.command(\\\"artifactcleanup\\\", handleArtifactCleanup);\\nbot.command(\\\"dailylog\\\", handleDailyLog);\\nbot.command(\\\"relay\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  await handleRelayCommand(ctx);\\n});\\nbot.command(\\\"pet\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  const arg = (ctx.match ?? \\\"\\\").trim().toLowerCase();\\n  try {\\n    if (!arg || arg === \\\"on\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(startPetApp());\\n    } else if (arg === \\\"off\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(stopPetApp());\\n    } else if (arg === \\\"status\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(petStatus());\\n    } else {\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"用法：/pet [on|off|status]\\\");\\n    }\\n  } catch (e: any) {\\n    await ctx.reply(`❌ Pet error: ${e.message}`);\\n  }\\n});\\nbot.command(\\\"back\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  const chatId = ctx.chat.id;\\n  if (!isProxyActive(chatId)) {\\n    await ctx.reply(\\\"目前沒有在 specialist proxy 模式中。\\\");\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const proxySession = endProxy(chatId);\\n  if (proxySession) {\\n    await ctx.reply(`✅ 已退出 specialist \\\"${proxySession.specialistName}\\\" proxy 模式。`);\\n    // Inject summary into main agent session.\\n    const summary = buildProxySummary(proxySession);\\n    const userId = ctx.from?.id ?? Firing opens an ephemeral AcpClient so scheduled prompts\\n// never touch the user's live chat session.\\nconst SCHEDULE_FILE = path.join(MEMORY_DIR, \\\"schedules.json\\\");\\nconst scheduleStore = new ScheduleStore(SCHEDULE_FILE);\\nconst scheduler = new Scheduler(bot, scheduleStore);\\n\\n// When /restart flushes sessions, onBeforeClose uses this to know which chat\\n// should have its save result recorded into the pending marker. Set by\\n// handleRestart right before sessions.shutdown(); cleared after exit anyway.\\nlet restartPendingChatId: number | undefined;\\n\\n// Best-effort: pipe fetch response body into a file.\\nasync function downloadToFile(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {\\n  const res = await fetch(url);\\n  if (!res.ok || !res.body) {\\n    throw new Error(`download failed: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);\\n  }\\n  await mkdir(path.dirname(destPath), { recursive: true });\\n  // Node 18+: Readable.fromWeb for WHATWG stream → Node stream.\\n  const { Readable } = await import(\\\"node:stream\\\");\\n  const nodeStream = Readable.fromWeb(res.body as any);\\n  await pipeline(nodeStream, createWriteStream(destPath));\\n}\\n\\nfunction sanitizeName(name: string): string {\\n  return name.replace(/[\\\\\\\\/:*?\\\"<>|\\\\x00-\\\\x1f]/g, \\\"_\\\").slice(0, 120) || \\\"file\\\";\\n}\\n\\nconst DOC_CONVERTIBLE_EXTS = new Set([\\\".pdf\\\", \\\".docx\\\", \\\".pptx\\\", \\\".xlsx\\\", \\\".xls\\\", \\\".html\\\", \\\".htm\\\"]);\\n\\n\\n// ─── Pending /schedule wizard state ────────────────────────────────────────\\nconst PENDING_SCHEDULE_TTL_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000;\\n\\n// ─── 群組模式：防止 bot 互相無限乒乓 ─────────────────────────────────────\\nconst GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS = Number(process.env.GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS ?? \\\"5\\\");\\nconst BOT_ALLOWED_UPDATES = [\\\"message\\\", \\\"callback_query\\\", \\\"message_reaction\\\"] as const;\\nconst groupTurnCounters = new Map<string, number>();\\n\\n// Relay idle-loop prevention: managed by commands/relay.ts (getRelayLoopGuard)\\n\\n// ─── AB-7b goal continuation timer map ────────────────────────────────────\\n// Per-chat setTimeout handle; set when a goal continuation is scheduled,\\n// cleared (a) when the continuation fires or (b) when a real user message\\n// arrives before it fires (user preempt). The delay gives the user a short\\n// window to type something that should be handled before the agent auto-\\n// continues.\\n\\n// How often (ms) we're allowed to update the streaming reply message.\\nconst STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS = config.streamEditIntervalMs;\\n\\nfunction isAllowed(ctx: Context): boolean {\\n  if (config.allowedUserIds.length === 0) return true;\\n  const uid = ctx.from?.id;\\n  return typeof uid === \\\"number\\\" && config.allowedUserIds.includes(uid);\\n}\\n\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Command menu (inline + reply keyboards)\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// A single source of truth for the user-facing command list. Used to render\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Command handlers (reusable)\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Each handleX(ctx) contains the full body for one command, so it can be\\n// invoked both from bot.command() (slash command) and from the inline-button\\n// callback_query dispatcher below. A handler that depends on ctx.match (an\\n// argument) must gracefully handle the case where ctx.match is undefined —\\n// that's what happens when triggered from a button.\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"help\\\", handleHelp);\\nbot.command(\\\"menu\\\", handleMenu);\\nbot.command(\\\"hide\\\", handleHide);\\n\\n// Handle taps on the inline help keyboard.\\n//   help:<name>   → show that command's description (or return to menu)\\n//   run:<name>    → execute the command (dispatched through COMMAND_HANDLERS)\\nbot.on(\\\"callback_query:data\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未授權。\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const data = ctx.callbackQuery.data;\\n  const [kind, name] = data.split(\\\":\\\", 2);\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"help\\\") {\\n    if (name === \\\"_back\\\") {\\n      await ctx.editMessageText(HELP_INTRO, {\\n        parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n        reply_markup: buildHelpMenuKeyboard(),\\n      });\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(renderCommandDetail(spec), {\\n      parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n      reply_markup: buildCommandDetailKeyboard(spec),\\n    });\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"run\\\") {\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (spec.takesArg) {\\n      // Commands that strictly require an argument (e.g. /sendfile <path>)\\n      // can't be run from a button; hint the user to type it.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"需要參數，請直接輸入指令。\\\" });\\n      await ctx.reply(`請直接輸入 ${spec.usage} 來執行。`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const handler = COMMAND_HANDLERS[spec.name];\\n    if (!handler) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"此指令尚未支援按鈕執行。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `執行 ${spec.usage} 中…` });\\n    try {\\n      await handler(ctx);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`執行失敗：${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"IL\\\") {\\n    await handleIntelCallback(ctx, data);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"SS\\\") {\\n    await handleSkillSearchCallback(ctx, data);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"A\\\") {\\n    // ASK callback: data is `A:{question_id}:{key}`. split(\\\":\\\", 2) above\\n    // only gave us the first two fields, so re-split here to get the key.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const questionId = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const key = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate accidental ':' in key (shouldn't happen given ASK_KEY_RE)\\n    if (!questionId || !key) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無效的選擇。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const msgId = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.message_id;\\n    const entries = msgId !== undefined ? askRegistry.get(msgId) : undefined;\\n    const entry = entries?.find((e) => e.questionId === questionId);\\n    const opt = entry?.options.find((o) => o.key === key);\\n    const label = opt?.label ?? key; // fallback to key if registry lost (e.g. after restart)\\n\\n    // Strip the inline keyboard so the same buttons can't be re-tapped, but do\\n    // NOT rewrite the message content. Rewriting clobbered the original text —\\n    // and wiped it entirely when the message carried no plain `.text` (e.g. a\\n    // caption / rich-rendered message), which is the bug being fixed here. The\\n    // choice is surfaced via the callback toast and handled in a SEPARATE\\n    // follow-up message below (the runPrompt reply / wizard's ctx.reply), so\\n    // the message the user tapped stays intact.\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      // \\\"message is not modified\\\" (keyboard already gone) is harmless.\\n      console.warn(`[ASK] strip keyboard failed:`, (err as Error).message);\\n    }\\n    if (msgId !== undefined) askRegistry.delete(msgId);\\n\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已選擇：${label}` });\\n\\n    // Inject the choice as a new user turn. Session is looked up the same\\n    // way the message handler does — ctx.chat is present on callback_query.\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n\\n    // ─── /schedule wizard hooks ───────────────────────────────────────────\\n    // The schedule wizard uses ASK but does NOT want the choice forwarded to\\n    // the agent: selections drive bridge-local state transitions instead.\\n    if (questionId === \\\"sched_kind\\\") {\\n      await handleSchedKindChoice(ctx, chatId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (questionId.startsWith(\\\"sched_t_\\\")) {\\n      await handleSchedTimeChoice(ctx, chatId, questionId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    let session: ChatSession;\\n    try {\\n      session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`Failed to start Kiro agent: ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    // Record the choice in the follow-up reply itself (header), so the original\\n    // button message stays intact AND no extra message is needed.\\n    await runPrompt(ctx, session, `[ASK:${questionId}] ${key}`, {\\n      kind: \\\"user\\\",\\n      replyHeader: `我選擇了：${label}`,\\n    });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"specialist\\\") {\\n    if (!name || !isLocalSpecialist(name)) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"分身不存在。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat!.id;\\n    startProxy(chatId, name);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `進入 ${name}` });\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(`🤖 已進入 *${name}* proxy 模式。\\\\n打 /back 退出。`, { parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"sched\\\") {\\n    // Schedule management buttons. Two ops today:\\n    //   - `sched:rm:<id>` — delete a single schedule, re-render the list.\\n    //   - `sched:cancel`  — no-op escape hatch; just strips the inline\\n    //                       keyboard from the current message so a user\\n    //                       can dismiss all the 🗑 buttons without risking\\n    //                       a fat-finger tap.\\n    // Future subcommands (e.g. \\\"run\\\") can share this branch.\\n    //\\n    // Policy:\\n    //   - Silent toast on success/failure via answerCallbackQuery.\\n    //   - For `rm`, re-render the whole list by editing the original\\n    //     message so the removed row disappears; if the list is now\\n    //     empty, strip the keyboard and change the text to \\\"目前沒有排程。\\\".\\n    //   - For `cancel`, only edit reply_markup (keep the text) so the\\n    //     user still sees what schedules exist — they just can't tap any.\\n    //   - Permission: bridge is 1-on-1 today, but be defensive — reject\\n    //     `rm` when entry.userId !== ctx.from?.id. `cancel` skips the\\n    //     check because it's non-destructive.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const op = parts[1];\\n    const id = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate ':' in id (shouldn't happen; uuid slice)\\n    if (op === \\\"cancel\\\") {\\n      // Dismiss-keyboard escape hatch. No permission check: the button only\\n      // strips reply_markup from the message the user is already looking at,\\n      // so at worst a different user in a (hypothetical) group chat hides\\n      // the keyboard from themselves. No schedule state changes.\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        // \\\"message is not modified\\\" is fine — keyboard was already gone.\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] cancel clear-keyboard failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"已取消,未刪除任何排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (op !== \\\"rm\\\" || !id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的操作。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const entry = scheduleStore.get(id);\\n    if (!entry) {\\n      // Already gone — stale button (user double-tapped, or fired since the\\n      // list was rendered). Tell them, then try to redraw the list so the\\n      // phantom row disappears.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程已不存在。\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n        const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n        try {\\n          await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n            reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n          });\\n        } catch (err) {\\n          // editMessageText throws \\\"message is not modified\\\" if nothing\\n          // changed — that's fine, nothing to do.\\n          console.warn(\\n            `[sched] redraw after stale rm failed:`,\\n            (err as Error).message,\\n          );\\n        }\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (ctx.from?.id !== undefined && entry.userId !== ctx.from.id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"這不是你的排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId !== undefined && entry.chatId !== chatId) {\\n      // Button from another chat somehow reached here — refuse.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程不屬於這個聊天室。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    scheduler.disarm(id);\\n    await scheduleStore.remove(id);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已移除 ${id}。` });\\n\\n    // Redraw the list in place so the user sees the new state without\\n    // scrolling back to re-run /schedule list.\\n    if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n      const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n          reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n        });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] redraw after rm failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"SP\\\") {\\n    // SKILL_PROPOSE callback: data is `SP:{name}:{yes|no}`.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const skillName = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const choice = parts[2] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const originalText = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.text ?? \\\"\\\";\\n    if (choice === \\\"no\\\") {\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(`${originalText}\\\\n\\\\n→ 已略過`);\\n      } catch { /* ignore */ }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"已略過\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (choice === \\\"yes\\\") {\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(`${originalText}\\\\n\\\\n→ 開始萃取 skill…`);\\n      } catch { /* ignore */ }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"開始萃取…\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n      let session: ChatSession;\\n      try {\\n        session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        await ctx.reply(`Failed to start agent: ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n        return;\\n      }\\n      const skillDir = detectSkillDir();\\n      const prompt =\\n        `[系統] 使用者確認要把「${skillName}」寫成 skill。\\\\n` +\\n        `請依照 memory-to-skill 和 writing-skills 的規範，在 ${skillDir}/ms-${skillName}/ 建立 SKILL.md。\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n        `規則：\\\\n` +\\n        `- 先讀 ${skillDir}/writing-skills/SKILL.md 確認格式規範\\\\n` +\\n        `- 檢查 ${skillDir}/ 是否已有同名或高度重疊的 skill，有就 append/rewrite\\\\n` +\\n        `- YAML frontmatter 的 description 用「Use when…」開頭\\\\n` +\\n        `- 內容來自本次對話中的經驗/模式\\\\n` +\\n        `- 完成後 remember() 記錄新 skill 已建立`;\\n      await runPrompt(ctx, session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n});\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"start\\\", (ctx) =>\\n  ctx.reply(\\n    \\\"Hi, I'm bridged to Kiro. Send me any message and I'll forward it to the agent.\\\\n\\\" +\\n      \\\"You can also send documents, photos, voice, audio, or video — they'll be saved into `uploads/` under the agent's working directory and Kiro will be told where to find them.\\\\n\\\" +\\n      \\\"Tap the keyboard below, or send /help for a clickable command menu.\\\",\\n    { reply_markup: buildReplyKeyboard() },\\n  ),\\n);\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\nconst COMMAND_HANDLERS: Record<string, (ctx: Context) => Promise<any>> = {\\n  whoami: handleWhoami,\\n  reset: handleReset,\\n  cancel: handleCancel,\\n  restart: handleRestart,\\n  save: handleSave,\\n  handoff: handleHandoff,\\n  sendfile: handleSendfile,\\n  context: handleContext,\\n  usage: handleUsage,\\n  remember: handleRemember,\\n  memory: handleMemory,\\n  summary: handleSummary,\\n  memorytoskill: handleMemoryToSkill,\\n  backup: handleBackup,\\n  topicreview: handleTopicReview,\\n  wikisync: handleWikiSync,\\n  factlint: handleFactLint,\\n  wikilint: handleWikiLint,\\n  skilllint: handleSkillLint,\\n  refreshrouting: handleRefreshRouting,\\n  schedule: handleSchedule,\\n  intel: handleIntel,\\n  help: handleHelp,\\n  menu: handleMenu,\\n  hide: handleHide,\\n  // AB-6 additions\\n  skillusage: handleSkillUsage,\\n  pin: handlePin,\\n  unpin: handleUnpin,\\n  goal: handleGoal,\\n  model: handleModel,\\n  status: handleStatus,\\n  dream: handleDream,\\n  specialist: handleSpecialist,\\n  specialistreview: handleSpecialistReview,\\n  artifactcleanup: handleArtifactCleanup,\\n  utilityreport: handleUtilityReport,\\n  dailylog: handleDailyLog,\\n  sessionreflect: handleSessionReflect,\\n  sharedpull: handleSharedPull,\\n  sharedsync: handleSharedSync,\\n  wikigen: handleWikigen,\\n  docupdate: handleDocUpdate,\\n  skillsearch: handleSkillSearch,\\n};\\n\\n// Let scheduler dispatch \\\"/cmd\\\" prompts to these handlers (bridge-side\\n// commands like /restart / /schedule list) instead of forwarding them to the\\n// agent. Must happen after COMMAND_HANDLERS is declared; scheduler.armAll()\\n// runs later (after bot.start), so handlers are always ready by firing time.\\nscheduler.setCommandHandlers(COMMAND_HANDLERS);\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into session-extract module.\\ninitSessionExtract({\\n  bot,\\n  sessions,\\n  MEMORY_DIR,\\n  RESTART_PENDING_FILE,\\n  PENDING_EXTRACT_FILE,\\n  getRestartPendingChatId: () => restartPendingChatId,\\n  setRestartPendingChatId: (v) => { restartPendingChatId = v; },\\n});\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into working-state module.\\ninitWorkingState({ sessions, MEMORY_DIR });\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into run-prompt module.\\ninitRunPrompt({\\n  bot,\\n  sessions,\\n  rateLimitedUntil,\\n  onRateLimitRecovery,\\n  queuePendingMessage,\\n  handleRestart,\\n  STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS,\\n  MEMORY_DIR,\\n  scheduler,\\n  scheduleStore,\\n});\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into command modules (avoids circular imports).\\ninitCommandDeps({\\n  isAllowed,\\n  sessions,\\n  runPrompt,\\n  commandHandlers: COMMAND_HANDLERS,\\n  cancelPendingContinuation,\\n  formatRelative,\\n  scheduleStore,\\n  scheduler,\\n  extractFromSession,\\n  parseFactsJson,\\n  saveTranscript,\\n  estimateTokens,\\n  buildHelpMenuKeyboard,\\n  buildReplyKeyboard,\\n  helpIntro: HELP_INTRO,\\n  sendMessage: async (chatId, text) => {\\n    await bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text);\\n  },\\n});\\nstartIntelPodcastWorker();\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"whoami\\\", handleWhoami);\\nbot.command(\\\"reset\\\", handleReset);\\nbot.command(\\\"cancel\\\", handleCancel);\\nbot.command(\\\"restart\\\", (ctx) => handleRestart(ctx));\\nbot.command(\\\"save\\\", handleSave);\\nbot.command(\\\"handoff\\\", handleHandoff);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/收工(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleHandoff);\\nbot.command(\\\"sendfile\\\", handleSendfile);\\nbot.command(\\\"context\\\", handleContext);\\nbot.command(\\\"usage\\\", handleUsage);\\nbot.command(\\\"remember\\\", handleRemember);\\nbot.command(\\\"memory\\\", handleMemory);\\nbot.command(\\\"summary\\\", handleSummary);\\n// /MemoryToSkill — Telegram's setMyCommands requires lowercase, but users may\\n// also type the CamelCase form the help menu displays. Accept both.\\nbot.command(\\\"memorytoskill\\\", handleMemoryToSkill);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/MemoryToSkill(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleMemoryToSkill);\\nbot.command(\\\"schedule\\\", handleSchedule);\\nbot.command(\\\"intel\\\", handleIntel);\\nbot.command(\\\"backup\\\", handleBackup);\\nbot.command(\\\"wikisync\\\", handleWikiSync);\\nbot.command(\\\"factlint\\\", handleFactLint);\\nbot.command(\\\"wikilint\\\", handleWikiLint);\\nbot.command(\\\"skilllint\\\", handleSkillLint);\\n// /topic-review — Telegram lowercases command names (bot.command expects\\n// no hyphens), so register the plain form and also hears() the hyphenated\\n// form that appears in the help menu + scheduled prompts.\\nbot.command(\\\"topicreview\\\", handleTopicReview);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/topic-review(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleTopicReview);\\n// /refresh-routing — same dash handling as /topic-review\\nbot.command(\\\"refreshrouting\\\", handleRefreshRouting);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/refresh-routing(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleRefreshRouting);\\n// AB-6 new commands\\nbot.command(\\\"skillusage\\\", handleSkillUsage);\\nbot.command(\\\"pin\\\", handlePin);\\nbot.command(\\\"unpin\\\", handleUnpin);\\nbot.command(\\\"model\\\", handleModel);\\nbot.command(\\\"goal\\\", handleGoal);\\nbot.command(\\\"status\\\", handleStatus);\\nbot.command(\\\"dream\\\", handleDream);\\nbot.command(\\\"specialist\\\", handleSpecialist);\\nbot.command(\\\"specialistreview\\\", handleSpecialistReview);\\nbot.command(\\\"artifactcleanup\\\", handleArtifactCleanup);\\nbot.command(\\\"dailylog\\\", handleDailyLog);\\nbot.command(\\\"relay\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  await handleRelayCommand(ctx);\\n});\\nbot.command(\\\"pet\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  const arg = (ctx.match ?? \\\"\\\").trim().toLowerCase();\\n  try {\\n    if (!arg || arg === \\\"on\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(startPetApp());\\n    } else if (arg === \\\"off\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(stopPetApp());\\n    } else if (arg === \\\"status\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(petStatus());\\n    } else {\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"用法：/pet [on|off|status]\\\");\\n    }\\n  } catch (e: any) {\\n    await ctx.reply(`❌ Pet error: ${e.message}`);\\n  }\\n});\\nbot.command(\\\"back\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  const chatId = ctx.chat.id;\\n  if (!isProxyActive(chatId)) {\\n    await ctx.reply(\\\"目前沒有在 specialist proxy 模式中。\\\");\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const proxySession = endProxy(chatId);\\n  if (proxySession) {\\n    await ctx.reply(`✅ 已退出 specialist \\\"${proxySession.specialistName}\\\" proxy 模式。`);\\n    // Inject summary into main agent session.\\n    const summary = buildProxySummary(proxySession);\\n    const userId = ctx.from?.id ?? content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Decouple embedding model loading from NotebookLM routing table</title>
  <subtitle>Split initEmbedRouter into initEmbedModel and initEmbedRouter to allow model initialization without routing config</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added initEmbedModel() function that loads ONNX embedding model independently of routing table presence</fact>
    <fact>Added isEmbedModelReady() function to check model readiness separate from router readiness</fact>
    <fact>Modified initEmbedRouter() to delegate model loading to initEmbedModel() before computing centroids</fact>
    <fact>initEmbedModel() includes idempotency guard - returns early if embedder already loaded</fact>
    <fact>Model initialization now emits console log confirming model name when ready</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Refactored embed-router.ts to separate embedding model initialization from routing table setup. Previously, initEmbedRouter() atomically loaded both the ONNX model and NotebookLM routing centroids, creating a hard dependency where missing notebooklm-routing.json prevented model loading entirely. The new initEmbedModel() function loads the Xenova BGE multilingual model independently, allowing downstream consumers (memory-recall, skill-router, wiki-retrieval, intent-classifier, etc.) to use embeddings even when NotebookLM routing is unavailable. This architectural fix enables graceful degradation: core embedding features work, NotebookLM-specific routing fails safely.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>src/doctor.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/embed-router.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

hint the user to type it.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"需要參數，請直接輸入指令。\\\" });\\n      await ctx.reply(`請直接輸入 ${spec.usage} 來執行。`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const handler = COMMAND_HANDLERS[spec.name];\\n    if (!handler) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"此指令尚未支援按鈕執行。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `執行 ${spec.usage} 中…` });\\n    try {\\n      await handler(ctx);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`執行失敗：${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"IL\\\") {\\n    await handleIntelCallback(ctx, data);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"SS\\\") {\\n    await handleSkillSearchCallback(ctx, data);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"A\\\") {\\n    // ASK callback: data is `A:{question_id}:{key}`. split(\\\":\\\", 2) above\\n    // only gave us the first two fields, so re-split here to get the key.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const questionId = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const key = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate accidental ':' in key (shouldn't happen given ASK_KEY_RE)\\n    if (!questionId || !key) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無效的選擇。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const msgId = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.message_id;\\n    const entries = msgId !== undefined ? askRegistry.get(msgId) : undefined;\\n    const entry = entries?.find((e) => e.questionId === questionId);\\n    const opt = entry?.options.find((o) => o.key === key);\\n    const label = opt?.label ?? key; // fallback to key if registry lost (e.g. after restart)\\n\\n    // Strip the inline keyboard so the same buttons can't be re-tapped, but do\\n    // NOT rewrite the message content. Tell them, then try to redraw the list so the\\n      // phantom row disappears.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程已不存在。\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n        const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n        try {\\n          await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n            reply_markup: keyboard ??
