Firing opens an ephemeral AcpClient so scheduled prompts\\n// never touch the user's live chat session.\\nconst SCHEDULE_FILE = path.join(MEMORY_DIR, \\\"schedules.json\\\");\\nconst scheduleStore = new ScheduleStore(SCHEDULE_FILE);\\nconst scheduler = new Scheduler(bot, scheduleStore);\\n\\n// When /restart flushes sessions, onBeforeClose uses this to know which chat\\n// should have its save result recorded into the pending marker. Set by\\n// handleRestart right before sessions.shutdown(); cleared after exit anyway.\\nlet restartPendingChatId: number | undefined;\\n\\n// Best-effort: pipe fetch response body into a file.\\nasync function downloadToFile(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {\\n  const res = await fetch(url);\\n  if (!res.ok || !res.body) {\\n    throw new Error(`download failed: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);\\n  }\\n  await mkdir(path.dirname(destPath), { recursive: true });\\n  // Node 18+: Readable.fromWeb for WHATWG stream → Node stream.\\n  const { Readable } = await import(\\\"node:stream\\\");\\n  const nodeStream = Readable.fromWeb(res.body as any);\\n  await pipeline(nodeStream, createWriteStream(destPath));\\n}\\n\\nfunction sanitizeName(name: string): string {\\n  return name.replace(/[\\\\\\\\/:*?\\\"<>|\\\\x00-\\\\x1f]/g, \\\"_\\\").slice(0, 120) || \\\"file\\\";\\n}\\n\\nconst DOC_CONVERTIBLE_EXTS = new Set([\\\".pdf\\\", \\\".docx\\\", \\\".pptx\\\", \\\".xlsx\\\", \\\".xls\\\", \\\".html\\\", \\\".htm\\\"]);\\n\\n\\n// ─── Pending /schedule wizard state ────────────────────────────────────────\\nconst PENDING_SCHEDULE_TTL_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000;\\n\\n// ─── 群組模式：防止 bot 互相無限乒乓 ─────────────────────────────────────\\nconst GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS = Number(process.env.GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS ?? \\\"5\\\");\\nconst BOT_ALLOWED_UPDATES = [\\\"message\\\", \\\"callback_query\\\", \\\"message_reaction\\\"] as const;\\nconst groupTurnCounters = new Map<string, number>();\\n\\n// Relay idle-loop prevention: managed by commands/relay.ts (getRelayLoopGuard)\\n\\n// ─── AB-7b goal continuation timer map ────────────────────────────────────\\n// Per-chat setTimeout handle; set when a goal continuation is scheduled,\\n// cleared (a) when the continuation fires or (b) when a real user message\\n// arrives before it fires (user preempt). The delay gives the user a short\\n// window to type something that should be handled before the agent auto-\\n// continues.\\n\\n// How often (ms) we're allowed to update the streaming reply message.\\nconst STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS = config.streamEditIntervalMs;\\n\\nfunction isAllowed(ctx: Context): boolean {\\n  if (config.allowedUserIds.length === 0) return true;\\n  const uid = ctx.from?.id;\\n  return typeof uid === \\\"number\\\" && config.allowedUserIds.includes(uid);\\n}\\n\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Command menu (inline + reply keyboards)\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// A single source of truth for the user-facing command list. Used to render\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Command handlers (reusable)\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Each handleX(ctx) contains the full body for one command, so it can be\\n// invoked both from bot.command() (slash command) and from the inline-button\\n// callback_query dispatcher below. A handler that depends on ctx.match (an\\n// argument) must gracefully handle the case where ctx.match is undefined —\\n// that's what happens when triggered from a button.\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"help\\\", handleHelp);\\nbot.command(\\\"menu\\\", handleMenu);\\nbot.command(\\\"hide\\\", handleHide);\\n\\n// Handle taps on the inline help keyboard.\\n//   help:<name>   → show that command's description (or return to menu)\\n//   run:<name>    → execute the command (dispatched through COMMAND_HANDLERS)\\nbot.on(\\\"callback_query:data\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未授權。\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const data = ctx.callbackQuery.data;\\n  const [kind, name] = data.split(\\\":\\\", 2);\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"help\\\") {\\n    if (name === \\\"_back\\\") {\\n      await ctx.editMessageText(HELP_INTRO, {\\n        parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n        reply_markup: buildHelpMenuKeyboard(),\\n      });\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(renderCommandDetail(spec), {\\n      parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n      reply_markup: buildCommandDetailKeyboard(spec),\\n    });\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"run\\\") {\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (spec.takesArg) {\\n      // Commands that strictly require an argument (e.g. /sendfile <path>)\\n      // can't be run from a button; hint the user to type it.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"需要參數，請直接輸入指令。\\\" });\\n      await ctx.reply(`請直接輸入 ${spec.usage} 來執行。`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const handler = COMMAND_HANDLERS[spec.name];\\n    if (!handler) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"此指令尚未支援按鈕執行。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `執行 ${spec.usage} 中…` });\\n    try {\\n      await handler(ctx);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`執行失敗：${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"IL\\\") {\\n    await handleIntelCallback(ctx, data);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"SS\\\") {\\n    await handleSkillSearchCallback(ctx, data);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"A\\\") {\\n    // ASK callback: data is `A:{question_id}:{key}`. split(\\\":\\\", 2) above\\n    // only gave us the first two fields, so re-split here to get the key.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const questionId = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const key = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate accidental ':' in key (shouldn't happen given ASK_KEY_RE)\\n    if (!questionId || !key) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無效的選擇。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const msgId = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.message_id;\\n    const entries = msgId !== undefined ? askRegistry.get(msgId) : undefined;\\n    const entry = entries?.find((e) => e.questionId === questionId);\\n    const opt = entry?.options.find((o) => o.key === key);\\n    const label = opt?.label ?? key; // fallback to key if registry lost (e.g. after restart)\\n\\n    // Strip the inline keyboard so the same buttons can't be re-tapped, but do\\n    // NOT rewrite the message content. Rewriting clobbered the original text —\\n    // and wiped it entirely when the message carried no plain `.text` (e.g. a\\n    // caption / rich-rendered message), which is the bug being fixed here. The\\n    // choice is surfaced via the callback toast and handled in a SEPARATE\\n    // follow-up message below (the runPrompt reply / wizard's ctx.reply), so\\n    // the message the user tapped stays intact.\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      // \\\"message is not modified\\\" (keyboard already gone) is harmless.\\n      console.warn(`[ASK] strip keyboard failed:`, (err as Error).message);\\n    }\\n    if (msgId !== undefined) askRegistry.delete(msgId);\\n\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已選擇：${label}` });\\n\\n    // Inject the choice as a new user turn. Session is looked up the same\\n    // way the message handler does — ctx.chat is present on callback_query.\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n\\n    // ─── /schedule wizard hooks ───────────────────────────────────────────\\n    // The schedule wizard uses ASK but does NOT want the choice forwarded to\\n    // the agent: selections drive bridge-local state transitions instead.\\n    if (questionId === \\\"sched_kind\\\") {\\n      await handleSchedKindChoice(ctx, chatId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (questionId.startsWith(\\\"sched_t_\\\")) {\\n      await handleSchedTimeChoice(ctx, chatId, questionId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    let session: ChatSession;\\n    try {\\n      session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`Failed to start Kiro agent: ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    // Record the choice in the follow-up reply itself (header), so the original\\n    // button message stays intact AND no extra message is needed.\\n    await runPrompt(ctx, session, `[ASK:${questionId}] ${key}`, {\\n      kind: \\\"user\\\",\\n      replyHeader: `我選擇了：${label}`,\\n    });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"specialist\\\") {\\n    if (!name || !isLocalSpecialist(name)) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"分身不存在。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat!.id;\\n    startProxy(chatId, name);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `進入 ${name}` });\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(`🤖 已進入 *${name}* proxy 模式。\\\\n打 /back 退出。`, { parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"sched\\\") {\\n    // Schedule management buttons. Two ops today:\\n    //   - `sched:rm:<id>` — delete a single schedule, re-render the list.\\n    //   - `sched:cancel`  — no-op escape hatch; just strips the inline\\n    //                       keyboard from the current message so a user\\n    //                       can dismiss all the 🗑 buttons without risking\\n    //                       a fat-finger tap.\\n    // Future subcommands (e.g. \\\"run\\\") can share this branch.\\n    //\\n    // Policy:\\n    //   - Silent toast on success/failure via answerCallbackQuery.\\n    //   - For `rm`, re-render the whole list by editing the original\\n    //     message so the removed row disappears; if the list is now\\n    //     empty, strip the keyboard and change the text to \\\"目前沒有排程。\\\".\\n    //   - For `cancel`, only edit reply_markup (keep the text) so the\\n    //     user still sees what schedules exist — they just can't tap any.\\n    //   - Permission: bridge is 1-on-1 today, but be defensive — reject\\n    //     `rm` when entry.userId !== ctx.from?.id. `cancel` skips the\\n    //     check because it's non-destructive.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const op = parts[1];\\n    const id = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate ':' in id (shouldn't happen; uuid slice)\\n    if (op === \\\"cancel\\\") {\\n      // Dismiss-keyboard escape hatch. No permission check: the button only\\n      // strips reply_markup from the message the user is already looking at,\\n      // so at worst a different user in a (hypothetical) group chat hides\\n      // the keyboard from themselves. No schedule state changes.\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        // \\\"message is not modified\\\" is fine — keyboard was already gone.\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] cancel clear-keyboard failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"已取消,未刪除任何排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (op !== \\\"rm\\\" || !id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的操作。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const entry = scheduleStore.get(id);\\n    if (!entry) {\\n      // Already gone — stale button (user double-tapped, or fired since the\\n      // list was rendered). Tell them, then try to redraw the list so the\\n      // phantom row disappears.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程已不存在。\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n        const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n        try {\\n          await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n            reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n          });\\n        } catch (err) {\\n          // editMessageText throws \\\"message is not modified\\\" if nothing\\n          // changed — that's fine, nothing to do.\\n          console.warn(\\n            `[sched] redraw after stale rm failed:`,\\n            (err as Error).message,\\n          );\\n        }\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (ctx.from?.id !== undefined && entry.userId !== ctx.from.id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"這不是你的排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId !== undefined && entry.chatId !== chatId) {\\n      // Button from another chat somehow reached here — refuse.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程不屬於這個聊天室。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    scheduler.disarm(id);\\n    await scheduleStore.remove(id);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已移除 ${id}。` });\\n\\n    // Redraw the list in place so the user sees the new state without\\n    // scrolling back to re-run /schedule list.\\n    if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n      const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n          reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n        });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] redraw after rm failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"SP\\\") {\\n    // SKILL_PROPOSE callback: data is `SP:{name}:{yes|no}`.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const skillName = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const choice = parts[2] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const originalText = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.text ?? \\\"\\\";\\n    if (choice === \\\"no\\\") {\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(`${originalText}\\\\n\\\\n→ 已略過`);\\n      } catch { /* ignore */ }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"已略過\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (choice === \\\"yes\\\") {\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(`${originalText}\\\\n\\\\n→ 開始萃取 skill…`);\\n      } catch { /* ignore */ }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"開始萃取…\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n      let session: ChatSession;\\n      try {\\n        session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        await ctx.reply(`Failed to start agent: ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n        return;\\n      }\\n      const skillDir = detectSkillDir();\\n      const prompt =\\n        `[系統] 使用者確認要把「${skillName}」寫成 skill。\\\\n` +\\n        `請依照 memory-to-skill 和 writing-skills 的規範，在 ${skillDir}/ms-${skillName}/ 建立 SKILL.md。\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n        `規則：\\\\n` +\\n        `- 先讀 ${skillDir}/writing-skills/SKILL.md 確認格式規範\\\\n` +\\n        `- 檢查 ${skillDir}/ 是否已有同名或高度重疊的 skill，有就 append/rewrite\\\\n` +\\n        `- YAML frontmatter 的 description 用「Use when…」開頭\\\\n` +\\n        `- 內容來自本次對話中的經驗/模式\\\\n` +\\n        `- 完成後 remember() 記錄新 skill 已建立`;\\n      await runPrompt(ctx, session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n});\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"start\\\", (ctx) =>\\n  ctx.reply(\\n    \\\"Hi, I'm bridged to Kiro. Send me any message and I'll forward it to the agent.\\\\n\\\" +\\n      \\\"You can also send documents, photos, voice, audio, or video — they'll be saved into `uploads/` under the agent's working directory and Kiro will be told where to find them.\\\\n\\\" +\\n      \\\"Tap the keyboard below, or send /help for a clickable command menu.\\\",\\n    { reply_markup: buildReplyKeyboard() },\\n  ),\\n);\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\nconst COMMAND_HANDLERS: Record<string, (ctx: Context) => Promise<any>> = {\\n  whoami: handleWhoami,\\n  reset: handleReset,\\n  cancel: handleCancel,\\n  restart: handleRestart,\\n  save: handleSave,\\n  handoff: handleHandoff,\\n  sendfile: handleSendfile,\\n  context: handleContext,\\n  usage: handleUsage,\\n  remember: handleRemember,\\n  memory: handleMemory,\\n  summary: handleSummary,\\n  memorytoskill: handleMemoryToSkill,\\n  backup: handleBackup,\\n  topicreview: handleTopicReview,\\n  wikisync: handleWikiSync,\\n  factlint: handleFactLint,\\n  wikilint: handleWikiLint,\\n  skilllint: handleSkillLint,\\n  refreshrouting: handleRefreshRouting,\\n  schedule: handleSchedule,\\n  intel: handleIntel,\\n  help: handleHelp,\\n  menu: handleMenu,\\n  hide: handleHide,\\n  // AB-6 additions\\n  skillusage: handleSkillUsage,\\n  pin: handlePin,\\n  unpin: handleUnpin,\\n  goal: handleGoal,\\n  model: handleModel,\\n  status: handleStatus,\\n  dream: handleDream,\\n  specialist: handleSpecialist,\\n  specialistreview: handleSpecialistReview,\\n  artifactcleanup: handleArtifactCleanup,\\n  utilityreport: handleUtilityReport,\\n  dailylog: handleDailyLog,\\n  sessionreflect: handleSessionReflect,\\n  sharedpull: handleSharedPull,\\n  sharedsync: handleSharedSync,\\n  wikigen: handleWikigen,\\n  docupdate: handleDocUpdate,\\n  skillsearch: handleSkillSearch,\\n};\\n\\n// Let scheduler dispatch \\\"/cmd\\\" prompts to these handlers (bridge-side\\n// commands like /restart / /schedule list) instead of forwarding them to the\\n// agent. Must happen after COMMAND_HANDLERS is declared; scheduler.armAll()\\n// runs later (after bot.start), so handlers are always ready by firing time.\\nscheduler.setCommandHandlers(COMMAND_HANDLERS);\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into session-extract module.\\ninitSessionExtract({\\n  bot,\\n  sessions,\\n  MEMORY_DIR,\\n  RESTART_PENDING_FILE,\\n  PENDING_EXTRACT_FILE,\\n  getRestartPendingChatId: () => restartPendingChatId,\\n  setRestartPendingChatId: (v) => { restartPendingChatId = v; },\\n});\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into working-state module.\\ninitWorkingState({ sessions, MEMORY_DIR });\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into run-prompt module.\\ninitRunPrompt({\\n  bot,\\n  sessions,\\n  rateLimitedUntil,\\n  onRateLimitRecovery,\\n  queuePendingMessage,\\n  handleRestart,\\n  STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS,\\n  MEMORY_DIR,\\n  scheduler,\\n  scheduleStore,\\n});\\n\\n// Inject shared deps into command modules (avoids circular imports).\\ninitCommandDeps({\\n  isAllowed,\\n  sessions,\\n  runPrompt,\\n  commandHandlers: COMMAND_HANDLERS,\\n  cancelPendingContinuation,\\n  formatRelative,\\n  scheduleStore,\\n  scheduler,\\n  extractFromSession,\\n  parseFactsJson,\\n  saveTranscript,\\n  estimateTokens,\\n  buildHelpMenuKeyboard,\\n  buildReplyKeyboard,\\n  helpIntro: HELP_INTRO,\\n  sendMessage: async (chatId, text) => {\\n    await bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text);\\n  },\\n});\\nstartIntelPodcastWorker();\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"whoami\\\", handleWhoami);\\nbot.command(\\\"reset\\\", handleReset);\\nbot.command(\\\"cancel\\\", handleCancel);\\nbot.command(\\\"restart\\\", (ctx) => handleRestart(ctx));\\nbot.command(\\\"save\\\", handleSave);\\nbot.command(\\\"handoff\\\", handleHandoff);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/收工(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleHandoff);\\nbot.command(\\\"sendfile\\\", handleSendfile);\\nbot.command(\\\"context\\\", handleContext);\\nbot.command(\\\"usage\\\", handleUsage);\\nbot.command(\\\"remember\\\", handleRemember);\\nbot.command(\\\"memory\\\", handleMemory);\\nbot.command(\\\"summary\\\", handleSummary);\\n// /MemoryToSkill — Telegram's setMyCommands requires lowercase, but users may\\n// also type the CamelCase form the help menu displays. Accept both.\\nbot.command(\\\"memorytoskill\\\", handleMemoryToSkill);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/MemoryToSkill(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleMemoryToSkill);\\nbot.command(\\\"schedule\\\", handleSchedule);\\nbot.command(\\\"intel\\\", handleIntel);\\nbot.command(\\\"backup\\\", handleBackup);\\nbot.command(\\\"wikisync\\\", handleWikiSync);\\nbot.command(\\\"factlint\\\", handleFactLint);\\nbot.command(\\\"wikilint\\\", handleWikiLint);\\nbot.command(\\\"skilllint\\\", handleSkillLint);\\n// /topic-review — Telegram lowercases command names (bot.command expects\\n// no hyphens), so register the plain form and also hears() the hyphenated\\n// form that appears in the help menu + scheduled prompts.\\nbot.command(\\\"topicreview\\\", handleTopicReview);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/topic-review(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleTopicReview);\\n// /refresh-routing — same dash handling as /topic-review\\nbot.command(\\\"refreshrouting\\\", handleRefreshRouting);\\nbot.hears(/^\\\\/refresh-routing(?:@\\\\w+)?(?:\\\\s|$)/i, handleRefreshRouting);\\n// AB-6 new commands\\nbot.command(\\\"skillusage\\\", handleSkillUsage);\\nbot.command(\\\"pin\\\", handlePin);\\nbot.command(\\\"unpin\\\", handleUnpin);\\nbot.command(\\\"model\\\", handleModel);\\nbot.command(\\\"goal\\\", handleGoal);\\nbot.command(\\\"status\\\", handleStatus);\\nbot.command(\\\"dream\\\", handleDream);\\nbot.command(\\\"specialist\\\", handleSpecialist);\\nbot.command(\\\"specialistreview\\\", handleSpecialistReview);\\nbot.command(\\\"artifactcleanup\\\", handleArtifactCleanup);\\nbot.command(\\\"dailylog\\\", handleDailyLog);\\nbot.command(\\\"relay\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  await handleRelayCommand(ctx);\\n});\\nbot.command(\\\"pet\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  const arg = (ctx.match ?? \\\"\\\").trim().toLowerCase();\\n  try {\\n    if (!arg || arg === \\\"on\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(startPetApp());\\n    } else if (arg === \\\"off\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(stopPetApp());\\n    } else if (arg === \\\"status\\\") {\\n      await ctx.reply(petStatus());\\n    } else {\\n      await ctx.reply(\\\"用法：/pet [on|off|status]\\\");\\n    }\\n  } catch (e: any) {\\n    await ctx.reply(`❌ Pet error: ${e.message}`);\\n  }\\n});\\nbot.command(\\\"back\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) return;\\n  const chatId = ctx.chat.id;\\n  if (!isProxyActive(chatId)) {\\n    await ctx.reply(\\\"目前沒有在 specialist proxy 模式中。\\\");\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const proxySession = endProxy(chatId);\\n  if (proxySession) {\\n    await ctx.reply(`✅ 已退出 specialist \\\"${proxySession.specialistName}\\\" proxy 模式。`);\\n    // Inject summary into main agent session.\\n    const summary = buildProxySummary(proxySession);\\n    const userId = ctx.from?.id ?? // topic name → vector\\nlet initialized = false;\\n\\n// ─── Public API ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * Build topic vectors from current topics.json rules.\\n * Call after initEmbedRouter() so the model is loaded.\\n */\\nexport async function initMemoryRecall(): Promise<void> {\\n  if (!isEmbedRouterReady()) return;\\n  const rules = getTopicRules();\\n  topicVectors.clear();\\n  for (const rule of rules) {\\n    if (rule.topic === \\\"misc\\\") continue;   // e.g. \\\"backup\\\"\\n  usage: string;     // e.g. \\\"/backup\\\"\\n  repr: string;      // description used for embedding\\n  vector: Float32Array;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface IntentHit {\\n  command: string;\\n  usage: string;\\n  score: number;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── State ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nlet intents: IntentEntry[] = [];\\nlet initialized = false;\\n\\n// ─── Public API ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * Initialize intent vectors from command specs.\\n * Pass the same COMMAND_SPECS array used for help/menu.\\n */\\nexport async function initIntentClassifier(\\n  commands: Array<{ name: string; content.thinking:
The user is implementing a fix for the embedding model initialization issue. They're:

1. First edited embed-router.ts to add initEmbedModel() function that loads the model independently
2. Added isEmbedModelReady() function 
3. Modified initEmbedRouter() to call initEmbedModel() first
4. Then edited index.ts to import the new initEmbedModel function
5. Finally edited index.ts main() to call initEmbedModel() unconditionally before trying to initialize the NotebookLM router

This is the implementation phase of the decoupling fix they decided on. The key architectural change is separating "load the embedding model" (which all 8+ subsystems need) from "load NotebookLM routing centroids" (which only NotebookLM needs).

This is a bugfix - they're fixing a coupling bug where missing notebooklm-routing.json prevented the entire embedding subsystem from initializing.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>bugfix</type>
  <title>Fixed embedding model initialization dependency on NotebookLM routing config</title>
  <subtitle>Embedding model now loads unconditionally at startup, independent of notebooklm-routing.json presence</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added initEmbedModel() in embed-router.ts that loads ONNX model without requiring routing table</fact>
    <fact>Added isEmbedModelReady() helper function to check model readiness separate from router readiness</fact>
    <fact>Modified initEmbedRouter() to delegate model loading to initEmbedModel() before computing centroids</fact>
    <fact>Updated index.ts main() function to call initEmbedModel() unconditionally during startup initialization sequence</fact>
    <fact>Embedding model initialization now happens before NotebookLM router initialization attempt</fact>
    <fact>Fix enables memory-recall, skill-router, wiki-retrieval, intent-classifier, index-retrieval, memory-db vector search, page-index semantic search, and sticker emotion embedding to function when notebooklm-routing.json is missing</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented architectural fix for embedding subsystem initialization coupling bug. Previously, the ONNX embedding model loading was bundled inside initEmbedRouter(), which only ran when notebooklm-routing.json existed. When that config file was missing, the model never loaded, causing silent failure of 8+ subsystems that depend on embedText() for semantic operations. The fix extracts model initialization into a new initEmbedModel() function that runs unconditionally at startup, before attempting NotebookLM router initialization. This allows the bridge to gracefully degrade: core embedding features work normally, while NotebookLM-specific routing (a single specialized feature) fails cleanly when its config is unavailable. The model loader includes idempotency protection and console logging for observability.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>src/doctor.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/embed-router.ts</file>
    <file>src/index.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

wikiEntries = [];\\n  for (const { slug, summary } of entries) {\\n    const repr = `${slug}: ${summary}`;\\n    const vec = await embedText(repr);\\n    if (vec) wikiEntries.push({ slug, summary, scored.push({ slug: entry.slug, summary: entry.summary, score });\\n    }\\n  }\\n  if (scored.length === 0) return [];\\n  scored.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);\\n\\n  const topHits = injected });\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return results;\\n}\\n\\nexport function formatWikiBlock(hits: WikiHit[]): string {\\n  if (hits.length === 0) return \\\"\\\";\\n  const sections = hits.map(\\n    (h) => `## [[${h.slug}]] (relevance ${h.score.toFixed(2)})\\\\n${h.content}`\\n  );\\n  return (\\n    `[Wiki retrieval — auto-loaded pages relevant to this message]\\\\n` +\\n    sections.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\") +\\n    `\\\\n[End wiki retrieval]\\\\n\\\\n`\\n  );\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Internals ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * For long pages: extract H2 headings as a section index so the agent\\n * knows what's available without consuming full context budget.\\n */\\nfunction buildSectionIndex(slug: string, content: string): string ${h}`).join(\\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n  );\\n}\\n\\nfunction parseWikiIndex(indexPath: string): Array<{ slug: string; summary: string }> {\\n  try {\\n    const raw = readFileSync(indexPath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n (ab7.text ? `${ab7.text}\\\\n\\\\n${scheduleReceipts.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\")}` : scheduleReceipts.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\"))\\n    : ab7.text;\\n  const askKeyboard = buildAskKeyboard(ab7.askTokens);\\n\\n  // Text delivery (chunked). === chunks.length - 1;\\n      const pageTag = chunks.length > 1 ? `(${i + 1}/${chunks.length})\\\\n` : \\\"\\\";\\n      const text = pageTag + chunks[i];\\n      const extra = isLast && askKeyboard  } catch (err) {\\n        console.error(`[orphan ${chatId}] chunk send failed, queueing for replay:`, err);\\n        queuePendingMessage(chatId, text);\\n      }\\n      if (!isLast) await new Returns count loaded. */\\nexport async function loadSpecialistsConfig(agentConfigDir: string): Promise<number> {\\n  loadedAgentConfigDir = agentConfigDir;\\n  configPath = resolveBridgeConfigPath(\\\"specialists.json\\\", agentConfigDir);\\n  try {\\n    const raw = await readFile(configPath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);\\n    if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) {\\n      console.warn(`[specialist] ${configPath} is not an array, ignoring`);\\n      loadedConfig = [];\\n      return 0;\\n    }\\n    loadedConfig = (parsed as SpecialistsConfig).map(expandVars);\\n    console.log(`[specialist] loaded ${loadedConfig.length} specialist(s) from ${configPath}`);\\n    return loadedConfig.length;\\n  } catch (err: any) {\\n    if (err.code === \\\"ENOENT\\\") {\\n      console.log(`[specialist] no config at ${configPath} — feature disabled`);\\n    } else {\\n      console.warn(`[specialist] failed to load ${configPath}:`, err.message);\\n    }\\n    loadedConfig = [];\\n    return 0;\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Transcript persistence ────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst transcriptDir = path.join(config.memoryDir, \\\"sessions\\\");\\n\\nasync function appendTranscript(name: string, role: \\\"user\\\" | \\\"assistant\\\", text: string): Promise<void> {\\n  const date = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\\n  const file = path.join(transcriptDir, `specialist-${name}-${date}.md`);\\n  await mkdir(transcriptDir, { recursive: true });\\n  const prefix = role === \\\"user\\\" ? \\\"**User:**\\\" : `**${name}:**`;\\n  const entry = `${prefix}\\\\n${text}\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n`;\\n  await appendFile(file, entry, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Instance management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\ninterface LiveInstance {\\n  client: AcpClient;\\n  busy: boolean;\\n  sessionId: string;\\n}\\n\\nconst instances = new Map<string, LiveInstance>();\\n\\nfunction getEntry(name: string): SpecialistEntry | undefined {\\n  return loadedConfig.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n}\\n\\n/** Close and remove a specialist instance. */\\nexport function closeInstance(name: string): void {\\n  const inst = instances.get(name);\\n  if (inst) {\\n    inst.client.close();\\n    instances.delete(name);\\n    console.log(`[specialist:${name}] closed (task done)`);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/** Close a parallel instance by its unique instanceId. */\\nexport function closeParallelInstance(instanceId: string): void {\\n  const inst = parallelInstances.get(instanceId);\\n  if (inst) {\\n    inst.client.close();\\n    parallelInstances.delete(instanceId);\\n    console.log(`[specialist:${instanceId}] parallel instance closed`);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/** Parallel instances — keyed by unique instanceId, not reused. */\\nconst parallelInstances = new Map<string, LiveInstance>();\\n\\n/** Spawn a fresh instance (no reuse). Returns a unique instanceId. */\\nexport async function spawnNew(name: string, userId?: number): Promise<{ instanceId: string; inst: LiveInstance }> {\\n  const entry = getEntry(name);\\n  if (!entry) throw new Error(`[specialist] unknown specialist: ${name}`);\\n\\n  const instanceId = `${name}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2, 6)}`;\\n\\n  const opts: AcpClientOptions = {\\n    command: entry.harness.command,\\n    args: [...entry.harness.args],\\n    cwd: path.resolve(entry.cwd),\\n    // TG_ACTIVE_USER_ID rides the same process-env path as MEMORY_DIR — the ACP\\n    // adapter forwards parent env to its MCP stdio children, so the memory server\\n    // resolves the active user id (else list_facts fails \\\"active user id not configured\\\").\\n    env: {\\n      MEMORY_DIR: config.memoryDir,\\n      ...(userId ? { TG_ACTIVE_USER_ID: String(userId) } : {}),\\n      ...entry.env,\\n    },\\n    acpModel: entry.model,\\n    acpEffort: entry.effort,\\n    promptRetries: 2,\\n    promptRetryBaseMs: 1000,\\n  };\\n\\n  const client = new AcpClient(opts);\\n  client.on(\\\"stderr\\\", (chunk) => {\\n    process.stderr.write(`[specialist:${instanceId}] ${chunk}`);\\n  });\\n  client.on(\\\"exit\\\", (code) => {\\n    console.log(`[specialist:${instanceId}] process exited (code=${code})`);\\n    parallelInstances.delete(instanceId);\\n  });\\n\\n  // If harness uses --agent flag, kiro-cli loads MCP servers from its own\\n  // agent config — passing them again in session/new causes a crash.\\n  const mcpServers = harnessHasAgentFlag(entry) ? undefined : toAcpMcpServers(entry.mcpServers);\\n  const sessionId = await client.initializeAndCreateSession(opts.cwd, mcpServers);\\n  const inst: LiveInstance = { client, busy: false, sessionId };\\n  parallelInstances.set(instanceId, inst);\\n  console.log(`[specialist:${instanceId}] spawned (parallel), session=${sessionId}`);\\n  logEvent(\\\"specialist_spawn\\\", { instanceId, sessionId, parallel: true });\\n  return { instanceId, inst };\\n}\\n\\nasync function spawnOrReuse(name: string, userId?: number): Promise<LiveInstance> {\\n  const existing = instances.get(name);\\n  if (existing && !existing.client.isClosed) return existing;\\n\\n  // Clean up stale entry\\n  if (existing) instances.delete(name);\\n\\n  const entry = getEntry(name);\\n  if (!entry) throw new Error(`[specialist] unknown specialist: ${name}`);\\n\\n  const opts: AcpClientOptions = {\\n    command: entry.harness.command,\\n    args: [...entry.harness.args],\\n    cwd: path.resolve(entry.cwd),\\n    // See spawnNew: TG_ACTIVE_USER_ID rides the same process-env path as MEMORY_DIR\\n    // so the memory MCP child can resolve the active user id.\\n    env: {\\n      MEMORY_DIR: config.memoryDir,\\n      ...(userId ? { TG_ACTIVE_USER_ID: String(userId) } : {}),\\n      ...entry.env,\\n    },\\n    acpModel: entry.model,\\n    acpEffort: entry.effort,\\n    promptRetries: 2,\\n    promptRetryBaseMs: 1000,\\n  };\\n\\n  const client = new AcpClient(opts);\\n  client.on(\\\"stderr\\\", (chunk) => {\\n    process.stderr.write(`[specialist:${name}] ${chunk}`);\\n  });\\n  client.on(\\\"exit\\\", (code) => {\\n    console.log(`[specialist:${name}] process exited (code=${code})`);\\n    instances.delete(name);\\n  });\\n\\n  const sessionId = await client.initializeAndCreateSession(opts.cwd,\\n    harnessHasAgentFlag(entry) ? undefined : toAcpMcpServers(entry.mcpServers));\\n  const inst: LiveInstance = { client, busy: false, sessionId };\\n  instances.set(name, inst);\\n  console.log(`[specialist:${name}] spawned, session=${sessionId}`);\\n  logEvent(\\\"specialist_spawn\\\", { name, sessionId, parallel: false });\\n  return inst;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Dispatch ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface DispatchResult {\\n  payload: ResultPayload;\\n  /** Raw text chunks collected from the specialist's response. */\\n  rawOutput: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Dispatch a delegation to a local specialist.\\n * Spawns/reuses the specialist, sends the goal prompt, collects the response,\\n * and returns a structured ResultPayload.\\n */\\nexport async function dispatchToSpecialist(\\n  target: string,\\n  delegate: DelegatePayload,\\n  userId?: number,\\n): Promise<DispatchResult> {\\n  const entry = getEntry(target);\\n  if (!entry) throw new Error(`[specialist] unknown: ${target}`);\\n\\n  const inst = await spawnOrReuse(target, userId);\\n  if (inst.busy) {\\n    return {\\n      payload: { id: delegate.id, status: \\\"failed\\\", summary: \\\"Specialist is busy with another task\\\" },\\n      rawOutput: \\\"\\\",\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  inst.busy = true;\\n  const maxTurns = delegate.maxTurns ?? entry.maxTurns ?? 15;\\n  const timeoutMs = entry.timeoutMs ?? 1_800_000;\\n\\n  // Register with status store\\n  registerTask({\\n    taskId: delegate.id,\\n    type: \\\"specialist\\\",\\n    specialist: target,\\n    goal: delegate.goal.slice(0, 100),\\n  });\\n\\n  // Build preamble from relevant topic shards\\n  const preamble = await buildSpecialistPreamble(target, userId ?? 0).catch(() => \\\"\\\");\\n\\n  // Run scoped enrichment based on the delegation goal\\n  const scope = await getSpecialistScope(target).catch(() => undefined);\\n  const enrichment = await runEnrichment(delegate.goal, userId ?? 0, undefined, scope).catch(() => \\\"\\\");\\n\\n  // Build the goal prompt\\n  const prompt = buildGoalPrompt(delegate, preamble, enrichment);\\n\\n  let output = \\\"\\\";\\n  const updateHandler = (u: SessionUpdate) => {\\n    const up = u.update;\\n    if (\\n      (up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\" || up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\") \\n    ) {\\n      const content = up.content as { type?: string; text?: string } | undefined;\\n      if (content?.type === \\\"text\\\" && typeof content.text === \\\"string\\\") {\\n        output += content.text;\\n        const role = up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\" ? \\\"thought\\\" : \\\"agent\\\";\\n        broadcastSSE(delegate.id, { type: \\\"chunk\\\", role, text: content.text });\\n      }\\n    }\\n  };\\n  inst.client.on(\\\"update\\\", updateHandler);\\n\\n  try {\\n    // Multi-turn loop: keep prompting until agent says done or budget exhausted\\n    let turns = 0;\\n    let lastStopReason = \\\"\\\";\\n\\n    const deadline = Date.now() + timeoutMs;\\n\\n    while (turns < maxTurns && Date.now() < deadline) {\\n      turns++;\\n      updateTask(delegate.id, { turns, lastOutput: output.slice(-200) || undefined });\\n      broadcastSSE(delegate.id, { type: \\\"status\\\", status: \\\"running\\\", turns });\\n      const promptText = turns === 1 ? prompt : \\\"[系統] 繼續執行，完成後在回覆中說明結果。\\\";\\n\\n      const result = await Promise.race([\\n        inst.client.prompt(promptText),\\n        new Promise<never>((_, reject) =>\\n          setTimeout(() => reject(new Error(\\\"timeout\\\")), Math.max(1000, deadline - Date.now())),\\n        ),\\n      ]);\\n\\n      lastStopReason = result.stopReason;\\n      // If agent stopped normally (end_turn), check if it needs more turns\\n      if (lastStopReason === \\\"end_turn\\\" || lastStopReason === \\\"stop\\\") break;\\n      // tool_use means agent is still working — loop for next turn\\n    }\\n\\n    // Extract summary from output (last 2000 chars as summary)\\n    const summary = output.length > 2000 ? output.slice(-2000) : output || \\\"(no output)\\\";\\n\\n    const status: ResultPayload[\\\"status\\\"] =\\n      Date.now() >= deadline ? \\\"timeout\\\" : \\\"done\\\";\\n\\n    completeTask(delegate.id, status, { lastOutput: summary.slice(0, 200) });\\n    broadcastSSE(delegate.id, { type: \\\"status\\\", status });\\n\\n    // Persist transcript for /memorytoskill\\n    appendTranscript(target, \\\"user\\\", prompt).catch(() => {});\\n    appendTranscript(target, \\\"assistant\\\", output).catch(() => {});\\n\\n    logEvent(\\\"specialist_done\\\", { target, taskId: delegate.id, status, turns });\\n    return {\\n      payload: { id: delegate.id, status, summary },\\n      rawOutput: output,\\n    };\\n  } catch (err: any) {\\n    const msg = err.message ?? String(err);\\n    const failStatus = msg.includes(\\\"timeout\\\") ? \\\"timeout\\\" : \\\"failed\\\";\\n    completeTask(delegate.id, failStatus, { error: msg.slice(0, 200) });\\n    broadcastSSE(delegate.id, { type: \\\"status\\\", status: failStatus });\\n    logEvent(\\\"specialist_done\\\", { target, taskId: delegate.id, status: failStatus, error: msg.slice(0, 100) });\\n    return {\\n      payload: { id: delegate.id, status: \\\"failed\\\", summary: `Error: ${msg.slice(0, 500)}` },\\n      rawOutput: output,\\n    };\\n  } finally {\\n    inst.client.removeListener(\\\"update\\\", updateHandler);\\n    inst.busy = false;\\n    closeInstance(target);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction buildGoalPrompt(d: DelegatePayload, preamble: string, enrichment?: string): string {\\n  let prompt = preamble;\\n  if (enrichment) prompt += enrichment;\\n  prompt += `[Delegation Task — id: ${d.id}]\\\\n`;\\n  prompt += `Goal: ${d.goal}\\\\n`;\\n  if (d.context) prompt += `Context: ${d.context}\\\\n`;\\n  prompt += `\\\\nComplete this task. When done, summarize what you accomplished.`;\\n  return prompt;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Parallel Dispatch ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ParallelTask {\\n  taskId: string;\\n  target: string;\\n  payload: DelegatePayload;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ParallelResult {\\n  taskId: string;\\n  target: string;\\n  status: \\\"done\\\" | \\\"timeout\\\" | \\\"failed\\\";\\n  summary: string;\\n  rawOutput: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Dispatch multiple delegations in parallel. Each gets its own fresh instance.\\n * Returns after all settle (Promise.allSettled).\\n */\\nexport async function dispatchParallel(\\n  tasks: ParallelTask[],\\n  userId?: number,\\n): Promise<ParallelResult[]> {\\n  const promises = tasks.map(async (task): Promise<ParallelResult> => {\\n    const entry = getEntry(task.target);\\n    if (!entry) {\\n      return { taskId: task.taskId, target: task.target, status: \\\"failed\\\", summary: `Unknown specialist: ${task.target}`, rawOutput: \\\"\\\" };\\n    }\\n\\n    let instanceId = \\\"\\\";\\n    try {\\n      registerTask({\\n        taskId: task.taskId,\\n        type: \\\"parallel_delegate\\\",\\n        specialist: task.target,\\n        goal: task.payload.goal.slice(0, 100),\\n      });\\n      const spawned = await spawnNew(task.target, userId);\\n      instanceId = spawned.instanceId;\\n      const inst = spawned.inst;\\n\\n      const maxTurns = task.payload.maxTurns ?? entry.maxTurns ?? 15;\\n      const timeoutMs = entry.timeoutMs ?? 1_800_000;\\n\\n      const preamble = await buildSpecialistPreamble(task.target, userId ?? 0).catch(() => \\\"\\\");\\n      const scope = await getSpecialistScope(task.target).catch(() => undefined);\\n      const enrichment = await runEnrichment(task.payload.goal, userId ?? 0, undefined, scope).catch(() => \\\"\\\");\\n      const prompt = buildGoalPrompt(task.payload, preamble, enrichment);\\n\\n      let output = \\\"\\\";\\n      const updateHandler = (u: SessionUpdate) => {\\n        const up = u.update;\\n        if (\\n          (up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\" || up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\")\\n        ) {\\n          const content = up.content as { type?: string; text?: string } | undefined;\\n          if (content?.type === \\\"text\\\" && typeof content.text === \\\"string\\\") {\\n            output += content.text;\\n            const role = up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\" ? \\\"thought\\\" : \\\"agent\\\";\\n            broadcastSSE(task.taskId, { type: \\\"chunk\\\", role, text: content.text });\\n          }\\n        }\\n      };\\n      inst.client.on(\\\"update\\\", updateHandler);\\n\\n      try {\\n        let turns = 0;\\n        const deadline = Date.now() + timeoutMs;\\n\\n        while (turns < maxTurns && Date.now() < deadline) {\\n          turns++;\\n          const promptText = turns === 1 ? prompt : \\\"[系統] 繼續執行，完成後在回覆中說明結果。\\\";\\n          const result = await Promise.race([\\n            inst.client.prompt(promptText),\\n            new Promise<never>((_, reject) =>\\n              setTimeout(() => reject(new Error(\\\"timeout\\\")), Math.max(1000, deadline - Date.now())),\\n            ),\\n          ]);\\n          if (result.stopReason === \\\"end_turn\\\" || result.stopReason === \\\"stop\\\") break;\\n        }\\n\\n        const summary = output.length > 2000 ? output.slice(-2000) : output || \\\"(no output)\\\";\\n        const status: ParallelResult[\\\"status\\\"] = Date.now() >= deadline ? \\\"timeout\\\" : \\\"done\\\";\\n\\n        // Verifier gate (same as RELAY_DELEGATE path)\\n        if (status === \\\"done\\\" && output.length > 50) {\\n          const vr = await verifySpecialistOutput(task.payload.goal, output);\\n          logEvent(\\\"specialist_done\\\", { taskId: task.taskId, target: task.target, verifier: vr.pass ? \\\"PASS\\\" : \\\"NEEDS_FIX\\\", source: vr.source, issues: vr.issues?.slice(0, 300) });\\n          if (!vr.pass && vr.issues) {\\n            console.log(`[parallel:${task.taskId}] verifier NEEDS_FIX (${vr.source}): ${vr.issues.slice(0, 100)}`);\\n            // Retry once\\n            try {\\n              const retryPrompt = buildRetryPrompt(task.payload.goal, vr.issues);\\n              output = \\\"\\\";\\n              const retryResult = await Promise.race([\\n                inst.client.prompt(retryPrompt),\\n                new Promise<never>((_, reject) => setTimeout(() => reject(new Error(\\\"timeout\\\")), 120_000)),\\n              ]);\\n              void retryResult;\\n            } catch { /* retry failed — use original output */ }\\n          }\\n        }\\n\\n        completeTask(task.taskId, status, { lastOutput: summary.slice(0, 200) });\\n\\n        appendTranscript(task.target, \\\"user\\\", prompt).catch(() => {});\\n        appendTranscript(task.target, \\\"assistant\\\", output).catch(() => {});\\n\\n        return { taskId: task.taskId, target: task.target, status, summary, rawOutput: output };\\n      } finally {\\n        inst.client.removeListener(\\\"update\\\", updateHandler);\\n        closeParallelInstance(instanceId);\\n      }\\n    } catch (err: any) {\\n      if (instanceId) closeParallelInstance(instanceId);\\n      const msg = (err.message ?? String(err)).slice(0, 500);\\n      completeTask(task.taskId, \\\"failed\\\", { error: msg.slice(0, 200) });\\n      return { taskId: task.taskId, target: task.target, status: \\\"failed\\\", summary: `Error: ${msg}`, rawOutput: \\\"\\\" };\\n    }\\n  });\\n\\n  const settled = await Promise.allSettled(promises);\\n  return settled.map((s, i) =>\\n    s.status === \\\"fulfilled\\\"\\n      ? s.value\\n      : { taskId: tasks[i].taskId, target: tasks[i].target, status: \\\"failed\\\" as const, summary: `Unexpected: ${s.reason}`, rawOutput: \\\"\\\" },\\n  );\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Cleanup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport async function shutdownAllSpecialists(): Promise<void> {\\n  for (const [name, inst] of instances) {\\n    console.log(`[specialist:${name}] shutting down...`);\\n    await inst.client.close();\\n  }\\n  instances.clear();\\n  proxyState.clear();\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Transparent Proxy Mode ────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst PROXY_DONE_RE = /<<PROXY_DONE>>/i;\\n\\ninterface ProxySession {\\n  specialistName: string;\\n  /** Conversation history for end-of-proxy summary. */\\n  history: { role: \\\"user\\\" | \\\"assistant\\\"; text: string }[];\\n  startedAt: number;\\n  lastActivity: number;\\n  /** Facts already injected via enrichment — dedup across turns. */\\n  injectedFacts: Set<string>;\\n  /** Total chars sent to specialist (preamble + enrichment + user text). */\\n  charsIn: number;\\n  /** Total chars received from specialist. */\\n  charsOut: number;\\n}\\n\\nconst proxyState = new Map<number, ProxySession>();\\n\\n/** Check if a chatId is currently in proxy mode. */\\nexport function isProxyActive(chatId: number): boolean {\\n  return proxyState.has(chatId);\\n}\\n\\n/** Get the active proxy specialist name for a chatId. */\\nexport function getProxyTarget(chatId: number): string | undefined {\\n  return proxyState.get(chatId)?.specialistName;\\n}\\n\\n/** Get cumulative char stats for the active proxy session. */\\nexport function getProxyStats(chatId: number): { charsIn: number; charsOut: number } | undefined {\\n  const ps = proxyState.get(chatId);\\n  return ps ? { charsIn: ps.charsIn, charsOut: ps.charsOut } : undefined;\\n}\\n\\n/** Enter proxy mode: subsequent user messages go directly to this specialist. */\\nexport function startProxy(chatId: number, specialistName: string): void {\\n  proxyState.set(chatId, {\\n    specialistName,\\n    history: [],\\n    startedAt: Date.now(),\\n    lastActivity: Date.now(),\\n    injectedFacts: new Set(),\\n    charsIn: 0,\\n    charsOut: 0,\\n  });\\n  console.log(`[specialist:proxy] chat ${chatId} → proxy to \\\"${specialistName}\\\"`);\\n}\\n\\n/** Exit proxy mode. Returns the conversation history for summary injection. */\\nexport function endProxy(chatId: number): ProxySession | undefined {\\n  const session = proxyState.get(chatId);\\n  proxyState.delete(chatId);\\n  if (session) {\\n    console.log(`[specialist:proxy] chat ${chatId} exited proxy (${session.history.length} exchanges)`);\\n    closeInstance(session.specialistName);\\n  }\\n  return session;\\n}\\n\\n/** Register a callback for idle timeout auto-exit. */\\n/**\\n * Send a user message to the proxied specialist and collect the response.\\n * Returns the raw output text (caller is responsible for sending to Telegram\\n * and extracting memory tokens).\\n */\\nexport async function promptProxy(\\n  chatId: number,\\n  text: string,\\n  onChunk?: (currentOutput: string) => void,\\n  userId?: number,\\n): Promise<{ output: string; stopReason: string; proxyDone: boolean }> {\\n  const ps = proxyState.get(chatId);\\n  if (!ps) throw new Error(\\\"[specialist:proxy] no active proxy for this chat\\\");\\n\\n  const inst = await spawnOrReuse(ps.specialistName, userId);\\n\\n  // First prompt: prepend preamble + instruction so specialist knows about PROXY_DONE\\n  const isFirst = ps.history.length === 0;\\n  let prompt: string;\\n  if (isFirst) {\\n    const preamble = await buildSpecialistPreamble(ps.specialistName, userId ?? 0, { proxy: true }).catch(() => \\\"\\\");\\n    // Run scoped enrichment for the first message too\\n    const scope = await getSpecialistScope(ps.specialistName).catch(() => undefined);\\n    console.log(`[specialist:proxy] enrichment scope for ${ps.specialistName}:`, JSON.stringify(scope ?? null));\\n    console.log(`[specialist:proxy] subsystem ready: embed=${isEmbedRouterReady()}, wiki=${isWikiRetrievalReady()}, recall=${isMemoryRecallReady()}`);\\n    const enrichment = await runEnrichment(text, userId ?? 0, ps.injectedFacts, scope).catch((e) => { console.warn(\\\"[specialist:proxy] enrichment error:\\\", e); return \\\"\\\"; });\\n    console.log(`[specialist:proxy] enrichment result length: ${enrichment.length}${enrichment.length > 0 ? \\\" (has content)\\\" : \\\" (empty)\\\"}`);\\n    prompt = `${preamble}[System] You are in a proxy conversation with the user. Do NOT append <<PROXY_DONE>> unless the user explicitly ends the conversation (says goodbye, \\\"沒了\\\", \\\"就這樣\\\", \\\"thanks that's all\\\", etc.). content.thinking:
The user is updating memory-recall.ts to use isEmbedModelReady() instead of isEmbedRouterReady(). This is part of the fix to make the module check for just the model being ready, not the full router (which also requires the routing table).

They also updated the comment to say "Call after initEmbedModel()" instead of "Call after initEmbedRouter()".

This is propagating the decoupling fix to the dependent modules.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>Updated memory-recall module to use model-only readiness check</title>
  <subtitle>Replaced isEmbedRouterReady with isEmbedModelReady to decouple from routing table dependency</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>memory-recall.ts import changed from isEmbedRouterReady to isEmbedModelReady</fact>
    <fact>initMemoryRecall() now checks isEmbedModelReady() instead of isEmbedRouterReady()</fact>
    <fact>Updated JSDoc comment to reference initEmbedModel() instead of initEmbedRouter()</fact>
    <fact>Memory recall initialization no longer blocked by missing notebooklm-routing.json</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Propagated the embedding model decoupling fix to the memory-recall module. The module previously checked isEmbedRouterReady() during initialization, which would fail when notebooklm-routing.json was missing even though memory recall only needs the embedding model, not the NotebookLM routing table. By switching to isEmbedModelReady(), memory recall can now initialize successfully as long as the ONNX model loaded, regardless of routing config availability. This aligns the readiness check with the module's actual dependency - it only needs embedText() to work, not the full router with centroids.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>src/memory-recall.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/memory-recall.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

undefined : toAcpMcpServers(entry.mcpServers));\\n  const inst: LiveInstance = { client, busy: false, sessionId };\\n  instances.set(name, inst);\\n  console.log(`[specialist:${name}] spawned, session=${sessionId}`);\\n  logEvent(\\\"specialist_spawn\\\", { name, sessionId, parallel: false });\\n  return inst;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Dispatch ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface DispatchResult {\\n  payload: ResultPayload;\\n  /** Raw text chunks collected from the specialist's response. */\\n  rawOutput: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Dispatch a delegation to a local specialist.\\n * Spawns/reuses the specialist, sends the goal prompt, collects the response,\\n * and returns a structured ResultPayload.\\n */\\nexport async function dispatchToSpecialist(\\n  target: string,\\n  delegate: DelegatePayload,\\n  userId?: number,\\n): Promise<DispatchResult> {\\n  const entry = getEntry(target);\\n  if (!entry) throw new Error(`[specialist] unknown: ${target}`);\\n\\n  const inst = await spawnOrReuse(target, userId);\\n  if (inst.busy) {\\n    return {\\n      payload: { id: delegate.id, status: \\\"failed\\\", summary: \\\"Specialist is busy with another task\\\" },\\n      rawOutput: \\\"\\\",\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  inst.busy = true;\\n  const maxTurns = delegate.maxTurns ?? entry.maxTurns ?? 15;\\n  const timeoutMs = entry.timeoutMs ?? 1_800_000;\\n\\n  // Register with status store\\n  registerTask({\\n    taskId: delegate.id,\\n    type: \\\"specialist\\\",\\n    specialist: target,\\n    goal: delegate.goal.slice(0, 100),\\n  });\\n\\n  // Build preamble from relevant topic shards\\n  const preamble = await buildSpecialistPreamble(target, userId ?? 0, undefined, scope).catch(() => \\\"\\\");\\n\\n  // Build the goal prompt\\n  const prompt = buildGoalPrompt(delegate, preamble, enrichment);\\n\\n  let output = \\\"\\\";\\n  const updateHandler = (u: SessionUpdate) => {\\n    const up = u.update;\\n    if (\\n      (up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\" || up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\") \\n    ) {\\n      const content = up.content as { type?: string; text?: string } | undefined;\\n      if (content?.type === \\\"text\\\" && typeof content.text === \\\"string\\\") {\\n        output += content.text;\\n        const role = up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\" ? prompt : \\\"[系統] 繼續執行，完成後在回覆中說明結果。\\\";\\n\\n      const result = await Promise.race([\\n        inst.client.prompt(promptText),\\n        new Promise<never>((_, reject) =>\\n          setTimeout(() => reject(new Error(\\\"timeout\\\")), Math.max(1000, deadline - Date.now())),\\n        ),\\n      ]);\\n\\n      lastStopReason = result.stopReason;\\n      // If agent stopped normally (end_turn), check if it needs more turns\\n      if (lastStopReason === \\\"end_turn\\\" || lastStopReason === \\\"stop\\\") break;\\n      // tool_use means agent is still working — loop for next turn\\n    }\\n\\n    // Extract summary from output (last 2000 chars as summary)\\n    const summary = output.length > 2000 ? 0, undefined, scope).catch(() => \\\"\\\");\\n      const prompt = buildGoalPrompt(task.payload, preamble, enrichment);\\n\\n      let output = \\\"\\\";\\n      const updateHandler = (u: SessionUpdate) => {\\n        const up = u.update;\\n        if (\\n          (up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\" || up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\")\\n        ) {\\n          const content = up.content as { type?: string; text?: string } | undefined;\\n          if (content?.type === \\\"text\\\" && typeof content.text === \\\"string\\\") {\\n            output += content.text;\\n            const role = up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\" ? String(err)).slice(0, 500);\\n      completeTask(task.taskId, \\\"failed\\\", { error: msg.slice(0, 200) });\\n      return { taskId: task.taskId, target: task.target, status: \\\"failed\\\", summary: `Error: ${msg}`, rawOutput: \\\"\\\" };\\n    }\\n  });\\n\\n  const settled = await Promise.allSettled(promises);\\n  return settled.map((s, i) =>\\n    s.status === \\\"fulfilled\\\"\\n      ? s.value\\n      : { taskId: tasks[i].taskId, target: tasks[i].target, status: \\\"failed\\\" as const, summary: `Unexpected: ${s.reason}`, rawOutput: \\\"\\\" },\\n  );\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Cleanup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport async function shutdownAllSpecialists(): Promise<void> {\\n  for (const [name, inst] of instances) {\\n    console.log(`[specialist:${name}] shutting down...`);\\n    await inst.client.close();\\n  }\\n  instances.clear();\\n  proxyState.clear();\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Transparent Proxy Mode ────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst PROXY_DONE_RE = /<<PROXY_DONE>>/i;\\n\\ninterface ProxySession {\\n  specialistName: string;\\n  /** Conversation history for end-of-proxy summary. */\\n  history: { role: \\\"user\\\" | \\\"assistant\\\"; text: string }[];\\n  startedAt: number;\\n  lastActivity: number;\\n  /** Facts already injected via enrichment — dedup across turns. */\\n  injectedFacts: Set<string>;\\n  /** Total chars sent to specialist (preamble + enrichment + user text). */\\n  charsIn: number;\\n  /** Total chars received from specialist. */\\n  charsOut: number;\\n}\\n\\nconst proxyState = new Map<number, ProxySession>();\\n\\n/** Check if a chatId is currently in proxy mode. */\\nexport function isProxyActive(chatId: number): boolean {\\n  return proxyState.has(chatId);\\n}\\n\\n/** Get the active proxy specialist name for a chatId. */\\nexport function getProxyTarget(chatId: number): string | undefined {\\n  return proxyState.get(chatId)?.specialistName;\\n}\\n\\n/** Get cumulative char stats for the active proxy session. */\\nexport function getProxyStats(chatId: number): { charsIn: number; charsOut: number } | undefined {\\n  const ps = proxyState.get(chatId);\\n  return ps ? 0, { proxy: true }).catch(() => \\\"\\\");\\n    // Run scoped enrichment for the first message too\\n    const scope = await getSpecialistScope(ps.specialistName).catch(() => undefined);\\n    console.log(`[specialist:proxy] enrichment scope for ${ps.specialistName}:`, JSON.stringify(scope ?? `${enrichment}${text}` : text;\\n  }\\n\\n  let output = \\\"\\\";\\n  const updateHandler = (u: SessionUpdate) => {\\n    const up = u.update;\\n    if (\\n      (up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\" || up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\")\\n    ) {\\n      const content = up.content as { type?: string; text?: string } | undefined;\\n      if (content?.type === \\\"text\\\" && typeof content.text === \\\"string\\\") {\\n        output += content.text;\\n        onChunk?.(output);\\n      }\\n    }\\n  };\\n  inst.client.on(\\\"update\\\", updateHandler);\\n\\n  try {\\n    const result = await inst.client.prompt(prompt);\\n    ps.charsIn += prompt.length;\\n    ps.charsOut += output.length;\\n    ps.history.push({ role: \\\"user\\\", text });\\n    ps.history.push({ role: \\\"assistant\\\", text: output });\\n    ps.lastActivity = Date.now();\\n    // Persist transcript for /memorytoskill\\n    appendTranscript(ps.specialistName, \\\"user\\\", text).catch(() => {});\\n    appendTranscript(ps.specialistName, \\\"assistant\\\", output).catch(() => {});\\n    // Detect <<PROXY_DONE>> — specialist signals it's finished\\n    const proxyDone = PROXY_DONE_RE.test(output);\\n    const cleanOutput = output.replace(PROXY_DONE_RE, \\\"\\\").trim();\\n    return { output: cleanOutput, stopReason: result.stopReason, proxyDone };\\n  } finally {\\n    inst.client.removeListener(\\\"update\\\", updateHandler);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/** Build a summary of the proxy conversation for injection into main agent. */\\nexport function buildProxySummary(session: ProxySession): string {\\n  const lines: string[] = [];\\n  const count = Math.floor(session.history.length / 2);\\n  // Keep last 5 exchanges max for summary\\n  const recent = session.history.slice(-10);\\n  for (const h of recent) {\\n    const prefix = h.role === \\\"user\\\" ? Memory directory exists + facts file readable\\n  results.push(await checkMemory());\\n\\n  // 2. Embedding router loaded\\n  results.push(checkEmbedRouter());\\n\\n  // 3. content.thinking:
This is a series of edits updating multiple dependent modules (skill-router, wiki-retrieval, intent-classifier, index-retrieval, run-prompt, specialist) to use the new `isEmbedModelReady` check instead of `isEmbedRouterReady`.

This is the propagation phase of the fix - updating all the downstream consumers to use the correct readiness check. Each of these modules only needs the embedding model, not the full router with NotebookLM centroids.

I should create one observation capturing this propagation work.

  <title>Propagated model readiness check to all embedding consumer modules</title>

    <fact>index-retrieval.ts updated to check isEmbedModelReady during initIndexRetrieval and import statement changed</fact>
    <fact>run-prompt.ts updated to check isEmbedModelReady for auto-sticker selection and import statement changed</fact>
    <fact>specialist.ts updated to check isEmbedModelReady in proxy enrichment subsystem logging and import statement changed</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed the decoupling fix by propagating the new model-only readiness check throughout all embedding consumer modules. Each module's initialization function (initSkillRouter, initWikiRetrieval, initIntentClassifier, initIndexRetrieval) now checks isEmbedModelReady() instead of isEmbedRouterReady(), aligning the check with their actual dependency - they only need embedText() functionality, not the full NotebookLM router. The run-prompt module's auto-sticker selection feature also updated its runtime check. This ensures all 8 affected subsystems can initialize successfully when the embedding model loads, regardless of notebooklm-routing.json availability. The fix maintains backward compatibility while enabling graceful degradation of NotebookLM-specific routing features.</narrative>

The user is updating the doctor.ts health check to properly distinguish between:
1. Embedding model readiness (essential - all 8 subsystems need this)
2. NotebookLM router readiness (optional - just one specific feature)

The updated logic:
- If model is not ready → fail the check (ok: false)
- If model is ready but router isn't → pass the check (ok: true) with a detail note explaining NotebookLM routing is unavailable

This makes the health check accurately reflect the fix: the embedding subsystem is healthy as long as the model loaded, even if routing.json is missing.
